MUFBVAR._estimation 

   1import os
   2import sys
   3
   4import numpy as np
   5import math
   6
   7from collections import deque
   8
   9from scipy.stats import invwishart
  10import pandas as pd
  11from scipy.stats import multivariate_normal
  12from datetime import datetime
  13from pandas.tseries.offsets import Week , MonthBegin, QuarterBegin, Day
  14
  15import itertools
  16
  17from .mfbvar_funcs import calc_yyact
  18#plotting
  19import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
  20
  21#for progressbar
  22from tqdm import tqdm
  23from functools import partial
  24tqdm = partial(tqdm, position = 0, leave=True) # this line does the magic
  25
  26# for plots
  27
  28import matplotlib.backends.backend_pdf
  29
  30import plotly.graph_objects as go
  31
  32import plotly.io as pio
  33pio.renderers.default='browser'
  34import plotly.express as px
  35
  36#to save objects
  37import pickle
  38import copy
  39
  40
  41
  42#from MUFBVAR.pseudo_inverse.pseudo_inverse import calculate_pseudo_inverse
  43from .cholcov.cholcov_module import cholcovOrEigendecomp
  44from .inverse.matrix_inversion import invert_matrix
  45
  46# for hyperparameter tuning
  47from bayes_opt import BayesianOptimization

  49
  50
  51def fit(self, mufbvar_data, hyp):
  52    
  53    '''
  54    Estimates the model using the model parameter specified in the initialization. \n
  55    And the data provided. 
  56    
  57    Parameters
  58    ----------
  59    mufbvar_data : mufbvar_data class object 
  60        data in the form of a mufbvar_data class object
  61    hyp : list of list
  62        list containing list of the hyperparameters for each frequency step\n
  63        1. overall tightness\n
  64        2. scaling down the variance for the coefficients of a distant lag\n
  65        3. number of observations used for obtaining the prior for the covariance matrix of error terms\n
  66        4. tuning parameter for coefficients for constant\n
  67        5. tuning parameter for the covariance between coefficients\n
  68
  69    '''
  70    
  71    self.nex = 1
  72    self.hyp = hyp
  73    
  74    # data from mufbvar_data
  75    
  76    YMX_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YMX_list)
  77    YM0_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YM0_list)
  78    select_m_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_m_list)
  79    vars_m_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.vars_m_list)
  80    YMh_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YMh_list)
  81    index_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.index_list)
  82    frequencies = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.frequencies)
  83    self.frequencies = frequencies
  84    YQX_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YQX_list)
  85    YQ0_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YQ0_list)
  86    select_q = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_q)
  87    input_data_Q =  copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.input_data_Q)
  88    self.input_data_Q = input_data_Q
  89    varlist_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.varlist_list)
  90    select_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_list)
  91    select_c_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_c_list)
  92    Nm_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.Nm_list)
  93    nv_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.nv_list)
  94    Nq_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.Nq_list)
  95    select_list_sep = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_list_sep)
  96    freq_ratio_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.freq_ratio_list)
  97    YQ_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YQ_list)
  98    Tstar_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.Tstar_list)
  99    T_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.T_list)
 100    YDATA_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YDATA_list)
 101    YM_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YM_list)
 102    input_data = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.input_data)
 103    self.input_data = input_data
 104    
 105    nburn = round((self.nburn_perc)*self.nsim)
 106    self.nburn = nburn
 107    
 108    #test if nlags for each step is at least frequency ratio
 109    for i in range(len(freq_ratio_list)):
 110        if deque(self.nlags)[i] < freq_ratio_list[i]:
 111            sys.exit("The number of lags at each step must be at least as long as the corresponding frequency ratio")
 112    
 113    # fit the model
 114    ###############
 115    
 116    nlags_list_ = self.nlags
 117    
 118    # Initialize Matrices
 119    #########################
 120    
 121    # here we initialize all the matrixes for the sampling for all frequencies
 122    # we again create lists and append them, in the sample loop we can then
 123    # access these matrices 
 124    
 125    #create empty lists, so we can append to them
 126    T0_list = deque()
 127    p_list = deque()
 128    nlags_list = deque()
 129    kq_list = deque()
 130    nobs_list = deque()
 131    Tnew_list = deque()
 132    Tnobs_list = deque()
 133    
 134    varstxt_list = deque()
 135    smpltxt_list = deque()
 136    
 137    index_NY_list = deque()
 138    
 139    Sigmap_list    = deque()
 140    Phip_list      = deque()
 141    Cons_list      = deque()
 142    lstate_list    = deque()
 143    YYactsim_list  = deque()
 144    XXactsim_list  = deque()
 145    
 146    At_mat_list    = deque()
 147    Pt_mat_list    = deque()
 148    Atildemat_list = deque()
 149    Ptildemat_list = deque()
 150    loglh_list   = deque()
 151    counter_list = deque()
 152    
 153    phi_mm_list = deque()
 154    
 155    phi_mq_list = deque()
 156    phi_mc_list = deque()
 157    phi_qc_list = deque()
 158    
 159    Phi_list = deque()
 160    
 161    # Define Transition Equation Matrices in eq (10)
 162    GAMMAs_list = deque()
 163    
 164    
 165    GAMMAz_list = deque()
 166    GAMMAc_list = deque()
 167    GAMMAu_list = deque()
 168
 169    LAMBDAs_list = deque()
 170    
 171    LAMBDAz_list = deque()
 172    LAMBDAc_list = deque()
 173    LAMBDAu_list = deque()
 174    
 175    # Define Covariance Terms sig_mm, sig_mq_sig_qm, siq_qq
 176    sigma_list = deque()
 177    sig_mm_list = deque()
 178    sig_mq_list = deque()
 179    sig_qm_list = deque()
 180    sig_qq_list = deque()
 181    
 182    # Define W matrix in eq (15) -- _t for tilde
 183    Wmatrix_list = deque()
 184    LAMBDAs_t_list = deque()
 185    LAMBDAz_t_list = deque()
 186    LAMBDAc_t_list = deque()
 187    LAMBDAu_t_list = deque()
 188    
 189    At_list = deque()
 190    At_draw_list = deque()
 191    Pt_list = deque()
 192    Pmean_list = deque()
 193    
 194    Zm_list = deque()
 195    
 196    Yq_list = deque()
 197    Ym_list = deque()
 198    
 199    Pt_last_list = deque()
 200    
 201    YY_list = deque()
 202    
 203    #for i in range(len(YMh_list)):
 204    T0_list.append(int(nlags_list_[0]))
 205    p_list.append(int(nlags_list_[0]))
 206    nlags_list.append(p_list[0])
 207    kq_list.append(Nq_list[0] * p_list[0])
 208    nobs_list.append(int(T_list[0]) - int(T0_list[0]))
 209    Tnew_list.append(Tstar_list[0]-T_list[0])
 210    Tnobs_list.append(Tstar_list[0]-T0_list[0])
 211    
 212
 213    
 214    #for writing to a forecast w/ history file
 215    YMh_list[0] = YMh_list[0][int(T0_list[0]):-int(freq_ratio_list[0]),:]
 216    varstxt_list.append(np.hstack((YMX_list[0].columns, YQX_list[0].columns)))
 217    smpltxt_list.append(YMX_list[0].index[int(T0_list[0]):])
 218    
 219    index_NY_list.append(np.isnan(YDATA_list[0][nobs_list[0]+T0_list[0]:Tnobs_list[0]+T0_list[0],:]).T) # TODO CHECK
 220    
 221    # Parameter estimation
 222    # Matrices for collecting draws from Posterior Density
 223    Sigmap_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),nv_list[0],nv_list[0])))
 224    Phip_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),int(nv_list[0])*int(p_list[0])+1,int(nv_list[0]))))
 225    Cons_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),nv_list[0])))
 226    lstate_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),Nq_list[0],int(Tnobs_list[0]))))
 227    YYactsim_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),freq_ratio_list[0]+1,nv_list[0])))
 228    XXactsim_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),int(freq_ratio_list[0])+1,int(nv_list[0])*int(p_list[0])+1)))
 229    
 230    At_mat_list.append(np.zeros((int(Tnobs_list[0]), Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1))))
 231    Pt_mat_list.append(np.zeros((int(Tnobs_list[0]), (Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1))**2)))
 232    Atildemat_list.append(np.zeros((self.nsim, Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1))))
 233    Ptildemat_list.append(np.zeros((self.nsim, Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1),Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1))))
 234    loglh_list.append(0)
 235    counter_list.append(0)
 236    
 237    # Define phi, phi(mm), phi(mq), phi(mc) used in alt ss rep -- eq (9)
 238    phi_mm_list.append(np.zeros((int(Nm_list[0])*int(p_list[0]),int(Nm_list[0]))))
 239    phi_mm_list[0][:Nm_list[0],:Nm_list[0]] = np.eye(Nm_list[0])
 240    
 241    phi_mq_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*int(p_list[0]),int(Nm_list[0]))))
 242    phi_mc_list.append(np.zeros((1,Nm_list[0])))
 243    phi_qc_list.append(np.zeros((1,Nq_list[0])))
 244    
 245    Phi_list.append(np.vstack((0.95 * np.eye(int(Nm_list[0])+Nq_list[0]), np.zeros(((int(Nm_list[0])+Nq_list[0])*(int(p_list[0])-1)+1, int(Nm_list[0])+Nq_list[0])))))
 246    
 247    # Define Transition Equation Matrices in eq (10)
 248    GAMMAs_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1), Nq_list[0] * (int(p_list[0])+1))))
 249    IQ = np.eye(Nq_list[0])
 250    
 251    for j in range(int(p_list[0])):
 252        GAMMAs_list[0][(j+1)*Nq_list[0]:(j+2)*Nq_list[0], j*Nq_list[0]:(j+1)*Nq_list[0]] = IQ
 253        
 254    GAMMAs_list[0][:Nq_list[0],:Nq_list[0]] = 0.95 * np.eye(Nq_list[0])
 255    
 256    GAMMAz_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]* (int(p_list[0])+1), int(Nm_list[0])*p_list[0])))
 257    GAMMAc_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]+1), 1)))
 258    GAMMAu_list.append(np.vstack((np.eye(Nq_list[0]), np.zeros((p_list[0]*Nq_list[0],Nq_list[0])))))
 259
 260    LAMBDAs_list.append(np.vstack((np.hstack((np.zeros((Nm_list[0],Nq_list[0])), np.transpose(phi_mq_list[0]))),1/freq_ratio_list[0]*np.hstack((np.tile(np.eye(Nq_list[0]), freq_ratio_list[0]), np.zeros((Nq_list[0],Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]-(freq_ratio_list[0]-1)))))))))
 261    
 262    LAMBDAz_list.append(np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mm_list[0]), np.zeros((Nq_list[0], p_list[0]*Nm_list[0])))))
 263    LAMBDAc_list.append(np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mc_list[0]), np.zeros((Nq_list[0],1)))))
 264    LAMBDAu_list.append(np.vstack((np.eye(Nm_list[0]), np.zeros((Nq_list[0],Nm_list[0])))))
 265    
 266    # Define Covariance Terms sig_mm, sig_mq_sig_qm, siq_qq
 267    sigma_list.append((1e-4)*np.eye(Nm_list[0]+Nq_list[0]))
 268    sig_mm_list.append(sigma_list[0][:Nm_list[0],:Nm_list[0]])
 269    sig_mq_list.append(sigma_list[0][:Nm_list[0], Nm_list[0]:])
 270    sig_qm_list.append(sigma_list[0][Nm_list[0]:, :Nm_list[0]])
 271    sig_qq_list.append(sigma_list[0][Nm_list[0]:,Nm_list[0]:])
 272    
 273    # Define W matrix in eq (15) -- _t for tilde
 274    
 275    Wmatrix_list.append(np.hstack((np.eye(Nm_list[0]), np.zeros((Nm_list[0],Nq_list[0])))))
 276    LAMBDAs_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[0] @ LAMBDAs_list[0])
 277    LAMBDAz_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[0] @ LAMBDAz_list[0])
 278    LAMBDAc_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[0] @ LAMBDAc_list[0])
 279    LAMBDAu_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[0] @ LAMBDAu_list[0])
 280    
 281    At_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]+1))))
 282    Pt_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]+1), Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]+1))))
 283    
 284    for kk in range(5):
 285        Pt_list[0] = GAMMAs_list[0] @ Pt_list[0] @ GAMMAs_list[0].T + GAMMAu_list[0] @ sig_qq_list[0] @ GAMMAu_list[0].T
 286    
 287    # Lagged HF observations
 288    Zm_list.append(np.zeros((nobs_list[0], Nm_list[0]*p_list[0])))
 289    
 290    if Zm_list[0].size:
 291        for j in range(p_list[0]):
 292            Zm_list[0][:, j * Nm_list[0]:(j+1)*Nm_list[0]] = YM_list[0][T0_list[0]-(j+1):T0_list[0]+nobs_list[0]-(j+1),:]
 293            
 294    # Observations in Monthly Freq
 295    
 296    Ym_list.append(YM_list[0][T0_list[0]:nobs_list[0]+T0_list[0],:])
 297        
 298    Yq_list.append(YQ_list[0][T0_list[0]:nobs_list[0]+T0_list[0],:])
 299    
 300    
 301    # Estimation
 302    #################
 303    print(" ", end = '\n')
 304    print("Multi Frequency BVAR: Estimation", end = '\n')
 305    print("Frequencies: ", self.frequencies, end = "\n")
 306    print("Total Number of Draws: ",self.nsim)
 307    
 308    #Here we start the sample loop, j is the current sample
 309    #inside the sample loop we need a loop for the MFBVARS: m
 310    for j in tqdm(range(self.nsim)):
 311        for m in range(len(YMh_list)):
 312            
 313            # initialization
 314            if j > 0:
 315                At_list[m] = At_draw_list[m][0,:].T 
 316                Pt_list[m] = Pmean_list[m]
 317                
 318            # Kalman Filter Loop
 319            #########################
 320            
 321            
 322            for t in range(nobs_list[m]):  
 323                
 324                if Ym_list[m].size:
 325                    
 326                    if (t+1+T0_list[m])/freq_ratio_list[m] - np.floor((t+T0_list[m]+1)/freq_ratio_list[m]) == 0:
 327                        At1 = At_list[m]
 328                        Pt1 = Pt_list[m]
 329                        # Forecasting
 330                        alphahat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ At1 + GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
 331                        Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Pt1 @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
 332                        Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
 333                        yhat = LAMBDAs_list[m] @ alphahat + LAMBDAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + LAMBDAc_list[m][:,0]
 334                        nut = np.concatenate((Ym_list[m][t,:], Yq_list[m][t,:])) - yhat  
 335                        Ft = (LAMBDAs_list[m] @ Phat @ LAMBDAs_list[m].T + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_list[m].T
 336                            + LAMBDAs_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_list[m].T
 337                            + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T @ LAMBDAs_list[m].T)
 338                        Ft = 0.5*(Ft+Ft.T)
 339                        Xit = LAMBDAs_list[m] @ Phat + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
 340                        sol = Xit.T @ invert_matrix(Ft)
 341                        At_list[m] = alphahat + sol @ nut
 342                        Pt_list[m] = Phat - sol @ Xit
 343                        At_mat_list[m][t,:] = At_list[m].T
 344                        Pt_mat_list[m][t,:] = Pt_list[m].reshape((1, (Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1))**2), order = "F")
 345                    else:
 346                        At1 = At_list[m]
 347                        Pt1 = Pt_list[m]
 348                        # Forecasting
 349                        alphahat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ At1 + GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
 350                        Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Pt1 @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
 351                        Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
 352                        yhat = LAMBDAs_t_list[m] @ alphahat + LAMBDAz_t_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + LAMBDAc_t_list[m][:,0]
 353                    
 354                        nut = Ym_list[m][t,:] - yhat
 355                        Ft = (LAMBDAs_t_list[m] @ Phat @ LAMBDAs_t_list[m].T + LAMBDAu_t_list[m] @ sig_mm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_t_list[m].T
 356                            + LAMBDAs_t_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_t_list[m].T
 357                            + LAMBDAu_t_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T @ LAMBDAs_t_list[m].T)
 358                        Ft = 0.5*(Ft+Ft.T)
 359                        Xit = LAMBDAs_t_list[m] @ Phat + LAMBDAu_t_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
 360                        sol = Xit.T @ invert_matrix(Ft)
 361                        At_list[m] = alphahat + sol @ nut 
 362                        Pt_list[m] = Phat - sol @ Xit
 363                    
 364                        At_mat_list[m][t,:] = At_list[m].T
 365                        Pt_mat_list[m][t,:] = Pt_list[m].reshape((1, (Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1))**2), order = "F")
 366                else:
 367                    if (t+1+T0_list[m])/freq_ratio_list[m] - np.floor((t+T0_list[m]+1)/freq_ratio_list[m]) == 0:
 368                        At1 = At_list[m]
 369                        Pt1 = Pt_list[m]
 370                        # Forecasting
 371                        alphahat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ At1 + GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
 372                        Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Pt1 @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
 373                        Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
 374                        yhat = LAMBDAs_list[m] @ alphahat + LAMBDAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + LAMBDAc_list[m][:,0]
 375                        nut = Yq_list[m][t,:] - yhat  
 376                        Ft = (LAMBDAs_list[m] @ Phat @ LAMBDAs_list[m].T + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_list[m].T
 377                            + LAMBDAs_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_list[m].T
 378                            + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T @ LAMBDAs_list[m].T)
 379                        Ft = 0.5*(Ft+Ft.T)
 380                        Xit = LAMBDAs_list[m] @ Phat + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
 381                        sol = Xit.T @ invert_matrix(Ft)
 382                        At_list[m] = alphahat + sol @ nut
 383                        Pt_list[m] = Phat - sol @ Xit
 384                        At_mat_list[m][t,:] = At_list[m].T
 385                        Pt_mat_list[m][t,:] = Pt_list[m].reshape((1, (Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1))**2), order = "F")
 386                    else:
 387                        At1 = At_list[m]
 388                        Pt1 = Pt_list[m]
 389                        # Forecasting
 390                        alphahat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ At1 + GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
 391                        Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Pt1 @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
 392                        Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
 393                        At_list[m] = alphahat 
 394                        Pt_list[m] = Phat 
 395                        At_mat_list[m][t,:] = At_list[m].T
 396                        Pt_mat_list[m][t,:] = Pt_list[m].reshape((1, (Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1))**2), order = "F")
 397            Atildemat_list[m][j,:] = At_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-1,:]
 398            
 399            if j == 0:
 400                Pt_last_list.append(Pt_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-1,:].reshape((Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1),Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1)), order = "F"))
 401            else:
 402                Pt_last_list[m] = Pt_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-1,:].reshape((Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1),Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1)), order = "F")
 403            Ptildemat_list[m][j,:,:] = Pt_last_list[m]
 404            
 405            ########## Unbalanced Dataset ###########
 406            
 407            kn = nv_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1)
 408            
 409            # Measurement Equation
 410            
 411            Z1 = np.zeros((Nm_list[m], kn))
 412            Z1[:,:Nm_list[m]] = np.eye(Nm_list[m])
 413            
 414            Z2 = np.zeros((Nq_list[m], kn))
 415            
 416            for bb in range(Nq_list[m]):
 417                for ll in range(freq_ratio_list[m]):
 418                    Z2[bb, (ll+1)*Nm_list[m]+ll*Nq_list[m]+bb] = 1/freq_ratio_list[m]
 419            
 420            ZZ = np.vstack((Z1,Z2))
 421            
 422            if Ym_list[m].size:
 423                BAt = (np.concatenate((Ym_list[m][-1,:], np.atleast_1d(np.squeeze(Atildemat_list[m][j,:Nq_list[m]])))))
 424                for rr in range(1,p_list[m]+1):
 425                    BAt = np.concatenate((BAt,np.concatenate((Ym_list[m][-(rr+1),:], np.atleast_1d(np.squeeze(Atildemat_list[m][j,rr*Nq_list[m]:(rr+1)*Nq_list[m]]))))))
 426            
 427            else: 
 428                BAt = np.atleast_1d(np.squeeze(Atildemat_list[m][j,:Nq_list[m]]))
 429                for rr in range(1,p_list[m]+1):
 430                    BAt = np.concatenate((BAt,np.atleast_1d(np.squeeze(Atildemat_list[m][j,rr*Nq_list[m]:(rr+1)*Nq_list[m]]))))
 431            
 432            BPt = np.zeros((kn,kn))
 433            for rr in range(p_list[m]+1):
 434                for vv in range(p_list[m]+1):
 435                    BPt[(rr+1)*Nm_list[m]+rr*Nq_list[m]:(rr+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]), (vv+1)*Nm_list[m]+vv*Nq_list[m]:(vv+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])] = np.squeeze(
 436                        Ptildemat_list[m][j,rr*Nq_list[m]:(rr+1)*Nq_list[m],vv*Nq_list[m]:(vv+1)*Nq_list[m]])
 437                    
 438            BAt_mat = np.zeros((Tnobs_list[m], kn))
 439            BPt_mat = np.zeros((Tnobs_list[m], kn**2))
 440            
 441            
 442            BAt_mat[nobs_list[m]-1,:] = BAt
 443            BPt_mat[nobs_list[m]-1,:] = BPt.reshape((1,kn**2), order = "F")
 444            
 445            # Define companion form matrix PHIF
 446            PHIF = np.zeros((kn,kn))
 447            IF = np.eye(nv_list[m])
 448            for i in range(p_list[m]):
 449                PHIF[(i+1)*nv_list[m]:(i+2)*nv_list[m], i*nv_list[m]:(i+1)*nv_list[m]] = IF
 450                
 451            PHIF[:nv_list[m], :nv_list[m]*p_list[m]] = Phi_list[m][:-1,:].T
 452            
 453            # Define constant term CONF
 454            CONF = np.hstack((Phi_list[m][-1,:].T, np.zeros((nv_list[m]*p_list[m]))))
 455            
 456            # Define covariance term SIGF
 457            SIGF = np.zeros((kn,kn))
 458            SIGF[:nv_list[m],:nv_list[m]] = sigma_list[m]
 459            
 460            # Filter Loop
 461            ###################
 462            
 463            for t in range(nobs_list[m], Tnobs_list[m]):
 464                
 465                #new indicator
 466                kkk = t-nobs_list[m]
 467                
 468                # Define new data (ND) and new Z matrix (NZ)
 469                ND = YDATA_list[m][nobs_list[m]+T0_list[m]+kkk,:][~np.isnan(YDATA_list[m][nobs_list[m]+T0_list[m]+kkk,:])]
 470                NZ = ZZ[~index_NY_list[m][:,kkk],:]
 471                
 472                BAt1 = BAt
 473                BPt1 = BPt
 474                
 475                # Forecasting
 476                Balphahat = PHIF @ BAt1 + CONF
 477                BPhat = PHIF @ BPt1 @ PHIF.T + SIGF
 478                BPhat = 0.5 * (BPhat+BPhat.T)
 479                
 480                Byhat = NZ @ Balphahat
 481                Bnut = ND - Byhat
 482                
 483                BFt = NZ @ BPhat @ NZ.T
 484                BFt = 0.5*(BFt+BFt.T)
 485                
 486                #Updating
 487                sol_1 = (BPhat @ NZ.T) @ invert_matrix(BFt)
 488                BAt = Balphahat + sol_1 @ Bnut
 489                BPt = BPhat - sol_1 @ (BPhat @ NZ.T).T
 490                BAt_mat[t,:] = BAt
 491                BPt_mat[t,:] = BPt.reshape((1,kn**2), order = "F")
 492                
 493                
 494            AT_draw = np.zeros((Tnew_list[m]+1, kn))
 495            
 496            # Draw from multivariate normal
 497            Pchol = cholcovOrEigendecomp(BPt_mat[Tnobs_list[m]-1,:].reshape((kn, kn), order = "F"))
 498            AT_draw[-1, :] = BAt_mat[Tnobs_list[m]-1,:]+np.transpose(Pchol @ np.random.standard_normal(kn))
 499            
 500            # Kalman Smoother
 501            #####################
 502            
 503            for i in range(Tnew_list[m]):
 504                
 505                BAtt = BAt_mat[Tnobs_list[m]-(i+2),:]
 506                BPtt = BPt_mat[Tnobs_list[m]-(i+2),:].reshape((kn,kn), order = "F")
 507                
 508                BPhat = PHIF @ BPtt @ PHIF.T + SIGF
 509                BPhat = 0.5*(BPhat+BPhat.T)
 510                
 511                inv_BPhat = invert_matrix(BPhat)
 512                
 513                Bnut = AT_draw[-(i+1),:]- PHIF @ BAtt - CONF
 514                
 515                Amean = BAtt + (BPtt @ PHIF.T) @ inv_BPhat @ Bnut
 516                Pmean = BPtt - (BPtt @ PHIF.T) @ inv_BPhat @ np.transpose(BPtt @ PHIF.T)        
 517        
 518                #Draw from multivariate normal
 519                Pmchol = cholcovOrEigendecomp(Pmean)
 520                AT_draw[-2-i,:] = np.transpose(Amean + Pmchol @ np.random.standard_normal(kn))
 521                
 522            ########## Balanced Dataset ###########
 523            
 524            At_draw = np.zeros((nobs_list[m], Nq_list[m] * (p_list[m]+1)))
 525            for kk in range(p_list[m]+1):
 526                At_draw[nobs_list[m]-1, kk * Nq_list[m]:(kk+1)*+Nq_list[m]] = AT_draw[0,(kk+1)*Nm_list[m] + kk*Nq_list[m]:(kk+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])]
 527                
 528        
 529            # Kalman Smoother
 530            #####################
 531            
 532            for i in range(nobs_list[m]-1):
 533                Att = At_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-(i+2),:]#[:, np.newaxis]
 534                Ptt = Pt_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-(i+2),:].reshape(Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1), Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1), order = "F")
 535                
 536                
 537                Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Ptt @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
 538                
 539                Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
 540                
 541                inv_Phat = invert_matrix(Phat)
 542                
 543                nut = At_draw[nobs_list[m]-(i+1), :] - GAMMAs_list[m] @ Att - GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][nobs_list[m]-1-(i+1)] - GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
 544
 545                
 546                temp = Ptt @ GAMMAs_list[m].T
 547                Amean = Att + temp @ inv_Phat @ nut
 548                Pmean = Ptt - temp @ inv_Phat @ np.transpose(temp)
 549                
 550                Pmchol = cholcovOrEigendecomp(Pmean)
 551                At_draw[nobs_list[m]-1-(i+1), :] = np.transpose(Amean + Pmchol @ np.random.standard_normal(Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1)))
 552            
 553        
 554        
 555            # Minesota Prior                            
 556            ########################
 557            if Ym_list[m].size:
 558                YY = np.vstack((np.hstack((Ym_list[m], At_draw[:,:Nq_list[m]])), AT_draw[1:,:(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])]))
 559            else:
 560                YY = np.vstack((At_draw[:,:Nq_list[m]], AT_draw[1:,:(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])]))
 561        
 562            
 563            #lstate = np.zeros((Nq_list[m], Tnobs_list[m]))
 564            #for hh in range(Nq_list[m]):
 565            #    lstate[hh, :nobs_list[m]] = At_draw[:, hh]
 566            #    lstate[hh, nobs_list[m]:] = AT_draw[1:, Nm_list[m]+hh]
 567        
 568            if (j%self.thining == 0):
 569                for hh in range(Nq_list[m]):
 570                    lstate_list[m][int(int((j)/self.thining)), hh, :nobs_list[m]] = At_draw[:, hh]
 571                    lstate_list[m][int(int((j)/self.thining)), hh, nobs_list[m]:] = AT_draw[1:, Nm_list[m]+hh]
 572    
 573            nobs_ = np.shape(YY)[0] - T0_list[m]
 574            spec = np.hstack((nlags_list_[m], T0_list[m], self.nex, nv_list[m], nobs_))
 575        
 576        
 577            # dummy observations and actual observations
 578            #mdd, YYact, YYdum, XXact, XXdum = mdd_(self.hyp, YY, spec)
 579            YYact, YYdum, XXact, XXdum = calc_yyact(self.hyp[m], YY, spec)
 580            
 581            if (j%self.thining == 0):
 582                YYactsim_list[m][int(int((j)/self.thining)),:,:] = YYact[-(freq_ratio_list[m]+1):,:] #TODO
 583                XXactsim_list[m][int(int((j)/self.thining)),:,:] = XXact[-(freq_ratio_list[m]+1):,:]
 584            
 585            
 586            # Draws from posterior distribution
 587            
 588            Tdummy, n = YYdum.shape
 589            n = int(n)
 590            Tdummy = int(Tdummy)
 591            Tobs, n = YYact.shape
 592            X = np.vstack((XXact, XXdum))
 593            Y = np.vstack((YYact, YYdum))
 594            p = int(spec[0])
 595            T = Tobs + Tdummy
 596            F = np.zeros((int(n*p), int(n*p)))
 597            I = np.eye(n)
 598            
 599            for i in range(p-1):
 600                F[(i+1)*n:(i+2)*n, i*n:(i+1)*n] = I
 601    
 602            vl, d, vr = np.linalg.svd(X, full_matrices=False)
 603            vr = vr.T
 604            di = 1/d
 605            B = vl.T @ Y
 606            xxi = (vr * np.tile(di.T,(n*p+1,1))) 
 607            inv_x = xxi @ xxi.T
 608            Phi_tilde = xxi @ B
 609    
 610            Sigma = (Y - X @ Phi_tilde).T @ (Y - X @ Phi_tilde)
 611            
 612            # Draws from the density Sigma | Y 
 613            sigma = invwishart.rvs(scale = Sigma, df = T-n*p-1)
 614            
 615            # Draws from density vec(Phi)|Sigma(j), Y
 616            sigma_chol = cholcovOrEigendecomp(np.kron(sigma, inv_x))
 617            phi_new =  np.squeeze(Phi_tilde.reshape(n*(n*p+1),1,order = "F")) + sigma_chol @ np.random.standard_normal(sigma_chol.shape[0])
 618            
 619            #phi_new = np.random.default_rng().multivariate_normal(mean = np.squeeze(Phi_tilde.reshape(n*(n*p+1),1,order = "F")), cov = np.kron(sigma, inv_x), method = "cholesky")
 620            
 621            Phi = phi_new.reshape(n*p+1,n,order = "F")
 622            
 623            if j > 0:
 624                Phi_list[m] = Phi
 625            elif j == 0 & m == 0:
 626                Phi_list[m] = Phi
 627            
 628            if (j % self.thining == 0):
 629                j_temp = int(j/self.thining)
 630                Sigmap_list[m][j_temp,:,:] = sigma
 631                Phip_list[m][j_temp,:,:]   = Phi
 632                Cons_list[m][j_temp,:]     = Phi[-1,:]
 633            
 634            # Define phi(qm), phi(qq), phi(qc)
 635            phi_qm = np.zeros((Nm_list[m]*p,Nq_list[m]))
 636            for i in range(p_list[m]):
 637                phi_qm[Nm_list[m]*i:Nm_list[m]*(i+1), :] = Phi[i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]):i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])+Nm_list[m],Nm_list[m]:]
 638                
 639            phi_qq = np.zeros((Nq_list[m]*p,Nq_list[m]))
 640            for i in range(p):
 641                phi_qq[Nq_list[m]*i:Nq_list[m]*(i+1), :] = Phi[i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])+Nm_list[m]:(i+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]), Nm_list[m]:]
 642                
 643            phi_qc = Phi[-1,Nm_list[m]:, np.newaxis]
 644            
 645            # Define  phi(mm), phi(mq), phi(mc)
 646            phi_mm = np.zeros((Nm_list[m]*p, Nm_list[m]))
 647            for i in range(p):
 648                phi_mm[Nm_list[m]*i:Nm_list[m]*(i+1),:] = Phi[i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]):i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])+Nm_list[m],:Nm_list[m]]
 649        
 650            phi_mq = np.zeros((Nq_list[m]*p, Nm_list[m]))
 651            for i in range(p):
 652                phi_mq[Nq_list[m]*i:Nq_list[m]*(i+1),:] = Phi[i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])+Nm_list[m]:(i+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]),:Nm_list[m]]      
 653            
 654            phi_mc = Phi[-1,:Nm_list[m], np.newaxis]
 655        
 656            # Define Covariance Term sig_mm, sig_mq, sig_qm, sig_qq
 657            if Nm_list[m]:
 658                sig_mm_list[m] = sigma[:Nm_list[m],:Nm_list[m]]  
 659                sig_mq_list[m] = 0.5*(sigma[:Nm_list[m],Nm_list[m]:]+np.transpose(sigma[Nm_list[m]:,:Nm_list[m]]))
 660                sig_qm_list[m] = 0.5*(sigma[Nm_list[m]:,:Nm_list[m]]+np.transpose(sigma[:Nm_list[m],Nm_list[m]:]))
 661                sig_qq_list[m] = sigma[Nm_list[m]:,Nm_list[m]:]
 662            else:
 663                sig_qq_list[m] =  np.atleast_2d(sigma)
 664            
 665            
 666            # Define Transition Equation Matrices
 667            GAMMAs_list[m] = np.vstack((np.hstack((np.transpose(phi_qq), np.zeros((Nq_list[m],Nq_list[m])))), np.hstack((np.eye(p*Nq_list[m]), np.zeros((p*Nq_list[m],Nq_list[m]))))))
 668            GAMMAz_list[m] = np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_qm), np.zeros((p*Nq_list[m], p*Nm_list[m]))))
 669            GAMMAc_list[m] = np.vstack((phi_qc, np.zeros((p*Nq_list[m],1))))
 670            GAMMAu_list[m] = np.vstack((np.eye(Nq_list[m]), np.zeros((p*Nq_list[m],Nq_list[m]))))
 671            
 672            # Define Measurment equation Matrices
 673            LAMBDAs_list[m] = np.vstack((np.hstack((np.zeros((Nm_list[m],Nq_list[m])), np.transpose(phi_mq))),1/freq_ratio_list[m]*np.hstack((np.tile(np.eye(Nq_list[m]), freq_ratio_list[m]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m],Nq_list[m]*(p-(freq_ratio_list[m]-1))))))))
 674            
 675        
 676            LAMBDAz_list[m] = np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mm), np.zeros((Nq_list[m], p*Nm_list[m]))))
 677            LAMBDAc_list[m] = np.vstack((phi_mc, np.zeros((Nq_list[m],1))))
 678            LAMBDAu_list[m] = np.vstack((np.eye(Nm_list[m]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m],Nm_list[m]))))
 679            
 680            # Define W matrix
 681            Wmatrix_list[m] = np.hstack((np.eye(Nm_list[m]), np.zeros((Nm_list[m], Nq_list[m]))))
 682            LAMBDAs_t_list[m] = np.matmul(Wmatrix_list[m],LAMBDAs_list[m])
 683            LAMBDAz_t_list[m] = np.matmul(Wmatrix_list[m], LAMBDAz_list[m])
 684            LAMBDAc_t_list[m] = np.matmul(Wmatrix_list[m], LAMBDAc_list[m])
 685            LAMBDAu_t_list[m] = np.matmul(Wmatrix_list[m], LAMBDAu_list[m])
 686    
 687            # now we need to define the new low frequency data as the temporally disaggregated
 688            # low frequency data of the current iteration
 689            
 690            if m < (len(YMh_list)-1):
 691                if j == 0:
 692                    #Yq_list.append((np.kron(lstate, np.ones((1,freq_ratio_list[m+1])))).T)
 693                    YQ0_list.append(YYact)#YQ0_list.append(YYact[:,-Nq_list[m+1]:])
 694                    YQ_list.append(np.kron(YQ0_list[m+1], np.ones((freq_ratio_list[m+1],1))))#[np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)])):,:])
 695                    #Yq_list.append(YQ_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:])
 696                    YM_list[m+1] = YM_list[m+1][2*np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)])):,:]
 697                    
 698                    T_list.append(YQ_list[m+1].shape[0])
 699                    
 700                    Tstar_list.append(YM_list[m+1].shape[0])
 701
 702                    Tnew_list.append(Tstar_list[m+1]-T_list[m+1])
 703
 704                    
 705                    YDATA_list.append(np.full((Tstar_list[m+1],nv_list[m+1]), np.nan))
 706                    YDATA_list[m+1][:,:Nm_list[m+1]] = YM_list[m+1]#[-Tstar_list[m+1]:,:]
 707                    
 708                    T0_list.append(int(nlags_list_[m+1]))
 709                    p_list.append(int(nlags_list_[m+1]))
 710                    nlags_list.append(p_list[m+1])
 711                    kq_list.append(Nq_list[m+1] * p_list[m+1])
 712                    nobs_list.append(int(T_list[m+1]) - int(T0_list[m+1]))
 713                    Tnobs_list.append(Tstar_list[m+1]-T0_list[m+1])
 714                    
 715                
 716                    
 717                    #for writing to a forecast w/ history file
 718                    #YMh_list[m+1] = YMh_list[m+1][int(T0_list[m+1]):-int(freq_ratio_list[m+1]),:]
 719                    YMh_list[m+1] = YMh_list[m+1][2*np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)]))+int(T0_list[m+1]):-int(freq_ratio_list[m+1]),:]
 720                    varstxt_list.append(np.hstack((YMX_list[m+1].columns, YQX_list[0].columns)))
 721                    smpltxt_list.append(YMX_list[m+1].index[int(T0_list[m+1]):])
 722                    
 723                    index_NY_list.append(np.isnan(YDATA_list[m+1][nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1]:Tnobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:]).T) # TODO CHECK
 724                    
 725                    # Parameter estimation
 726                    # Matrices for collecting draws from Posterior Density
 727                    Sigmap_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),nv_list[m+1],nv_list[m+1])))
 728                    Phip_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),int(nv_list[m+1])*int(p_list[m+1])+1,int(nv_list[m+1]))))
 729                    Cons_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),nv_list[m+1])))
 730                    lstate_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),Nq_list[m+1],int(Tnobs_list[m+1]))))
 731                    YYactsim_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),freq_ratio_list[m+1]+1,nv_list[m+1])))
 732                    XXactsim_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),int(freq_ratio_list[m+1])+1,int(nv_list[m+1])*int(p_list[m+1])+1)))
 733                    
 734                    At_mat_list.append(np.zeros((int(Tnobs_list[m+1]), Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1))))
 735                    Pt_mat_list.append(np.zeros((int(Tnobs_list[m+1]), (Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1))**2)))
 736                    Atildemat_list.append(np.zeros((self.nsim, Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1))))
 737                    Ptildemat_list.append(np.zeros((self.nsim, Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1),Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1))))
 738                    loglh_list.append(0)
 739                    counter_list.append(0)
 740                    
 741                    # Define phi, phi(mm), phi(mq), phi(mc) used in alt ss rep -- eq (9)
 742                    phi_mm_list.append(np.zeros((int(Nm_list[m+1])*int(p_list[m+1]),int(Nm_list[m+1]))))
 743                    phi_mm_list[m+1][:Nm_list[m+1],:Nm_list[m+1]] = np.eye(Nm_list[m+1])
 744                    
 745                    phi_mq_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*int(p_list[m+1]),int(Nm_list[m+1]))))
 746                    phi_mc_list.append(np.zeros((1,Nm_list[m+1])))
 747                    phi_qc_list.append(np.zeros((1,Nq_list[m+1])))
 748                    
 749                    Phi_list.append(np.vstack((0.95 * np.eye(int(Nm_list[m+1])+Nq_list[m+1]), np.zeros(((int(Nm_list[m+1])+Nq_list[m+1])*(int(p_list[m+1])-1)+1, int(Nm_list[m+1])+Nq_list[m+1])))))
 750                    
 751                    # Define Transition Equation Matrices in eq (10)
 752                    GAMMAs_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1), Nq_list[m+1] * (int(p_list[m+1])+1))))
 753                    IQ = np.eye(Nq_list[m+1])
 754                    
 755                    for k in range(int(p_list[m+1])):
 756                        GAMMAs_list[m+1][(k+1)*Nq_list[m+1]:(k+2)*Nq_list[m+1], k*Nq_list[m+1]:(k+1)*Nq_list[m+1]] = IQ
 757                        
 758                    GAMMAs_list[m+1][:Nq_list[m+1],:Nq_list[m+1]] = 0.95 * np.eye(Nq_list[m+1])
 759                    
 760                    GAMMAz_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]* (int(p_list[m+1])+1), int(Nm_list[m+1])*p_list[m+1])))
 761                    GAMMAc_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]+1), 1)))
 762                    GAMMAu_list.append(np.vstack((np.eye(Nq_list[m+1]), np.zeros((p_list[m+1]*Nq_list[m+1],Nq_list[m+1])))))
 763
 764                    LAMBDAs_list.append(np.vstack((np.hstack((np.zeros((Nm_list[m+1],Nq_list[m+1])), np.transpose(phi_mq_list[m+1]))),1/freq_ratio_list[m+1]*np.hstack((np.tile(np.eye(Nq_list[m+1]), freq_ratio_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1],Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]-(freq_ratio_list[m+1]-1)))))))))
 765                    
 766                    LAMBDAz_list.append(np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mm_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1], p_list[m+1]*Nm_list[m+1])))))
 767                    LAMBDAc_list.append(np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mc_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1],1)))))
 768                    LAMBDAu_list.append(np.vstack((np.eye(Nm_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1],Nm_list[m+1])))))
 769                    
 770                    # Define Covariance Terms sig_mm, sig_mq_sig_qm, siq_qq
 771                    sigma_list.append((1e-4)*np.eye(Nm_list[m+1]+Nq_list[m+1]))
 772                    sig_mm_list.append(sigma_list[m+1][:Nm_list[m+1],:Nm_list[m+1]])
 773                    sig_mq_list.append(sigma_list[m+1][:Nm_list[m+1], Nm_list[m+1]:])
 774                    sig_qm_list.append(sigma_list[m+1][Nm_list[m+1]:, :Nm_list[m+1]])
 775                    sig_qq_list.append(sigma_list[m+1][Nm_list[m+1]:,Nm_list[m+1]:])
 776                    
 777                    # Define W matrix in eq (15) -- _t for tilde
 778                    Wmatrix_list.append(np.hstack((np.eye(Nm_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nm_list[m+1],Nq_list[m+1])))))
 779                    LAMBDAs_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[m+1] @ LAMBDAs_list[m+1])
 780                    LAMBDAz_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[m+1] @ LAMBDAz_list[m+1])
 781                    LAMBDAc_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[m+1] @ LAMBDAc_list[m+1])
 782                    LAMBDAu_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[m+1] @ LAMBDAu_list[m+1])
 783                    
 784                    At_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]+1))))
 785                    Pt_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]+1), Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]+1))))
 786                    
 787                    for kk in range(5):
 788                        Pt_list[m+1] = GAMMAs_list[m+1] @ Pt_list[m+1] @ GAMMAs_list[m+1].T + GAMMAu_list[m+1] @ sig_qq_list[m+1] @ GAMMAu_list[m+1].T
 789                    
 790                    #YM_short = YM_list[m+1][2*np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)])):,:]
 791                    
 792                    # Lagged HF observations
 793                    Zm_list.append(np.zeros((nobs_list[m+1], Nm_list[m+1]*p_list[m+1])))
 794                    for k in range(p_list[m+1]):
 795                        Zm_list[m+1][:, k * Nm_list[m+1]:(k+1)*Nm_list[m+1]] = YM_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]-(k+1):T0_list[m+1]+nobs_list[m+1]-(k+1),:]
 796                    # Observations in Monthly Freq
 797                    
 798                    Ym_list.append(YM_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:])
 799                    #Ym_list.append(YM_list[m+1][:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:])    
 800                    #Yq_list.append(YQ_list[m+1])#
 801                    Yq_list.append(YQ_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:])
 802                    
 803                    
 804                    
 805                else:
 806                    #Yq_list[m+1] = (np.kron(lstate, np.ones((1,freq_ratio_list[m+1])))).T
 807                    YQ0_list[m+1] = YYact
 808                    YQ_list[m+1] = np.kron(YQ0_list[m+1], np.ones((freq_ratio_list[m+1],1)))#[np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)])):,:]
 809                    Yq_list[m+1] = YQ_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:]#YQ_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:]
 810                    T_list[m+1] = YQ_list[m+1].shape[0]
 811                    Tnew_list[m+1] = Tstar_list[m+1]-T_list[m+1]
 812                    
 813                YDATA_list[m+1][:T_list[m+1],Nm_list[m+1]:] = YQ_list[m+1]    
 814            
 815            if j == 0:
 816                At_draw_list.append(At_draw)
 817            else:
 818                At_draw_list[m] = At_draw
 819            
 820            if j == 0:
 821                Pmean_list.append(Pmean)
 822            else:
 823                Pmean_list[m] = Pmean
 824                    
 825                    
 826            #TODO
 827        
 828            
 829        self.YYactsim = YYactsim_list[-1]
 830        self.XXactsim = XXactsim_list[-1]
 831        self.Phip = Phip_list[-1]
 832        self.Sigmap = Sigmap_list[-1]
 833        self.YDATA = YDATA_list[-1]
 834        self.select_q = select_q
 835        self.select_m = select_m_list[-1]
 836        self.select = select_list[-1]
 837        self.varlist = varlist_list[-1]
 838        self.Nm = Nm_list[-1]
 839        self.nv = nv_list[-1]
 840        self.freq_ratio = freq_ratio_list[-1]
 841        self.T = T_list[-1]
 842        self.Tstar = Tstar_list[-1]
 843        self.YQX = YQX_list[-1]
 844        self.YMX = YMX_list[-1]
 845        self.YQ = YQ_list[-1]
 846        self.YM = YM_list[-1]
 847        self.YMh = YMh_list[-1]
 848        self.Ym = Ym_list[-1]
 849        self.Yq = Yq_list[-1]
 850        self.T0 = T0_list[-1]
 851        self.Tnew = Tnew_list[-1]
 852    
 853    
 854    #save lists to self
 855    self.YMh_list = YMh_list
 856    self.T0_list = T0_list
 857    self.freq_ratio_list = freq_ratio_list
 858    self.varstxt_list = varstxt_list
 859    self.Nm_list = Nm_list
 860    self.Nq_list = Nq_list
 861    self.nv_list = nv_list        
 862    self.YYactsim_list = YYactsim_list
 863    self.XXactsim_list = XXactsim_list
 864    self.Phip_list = Phip_list
 865    self.Sigmap_list = Sigmap_list
 866    self.select_list = select_list
 867    self.Tnew_list = Tnew_list
 868    self.Ym_list = Ym_list
 869    self.Yq_list = Yq_list
 870    self.select_m_list = select_m_list
 871    self.select_q = select_q
 872    self.lstate_list = lstate_list
 873    self.nlags_list = nlags_list
 874    self.varlist_list = varlist_list
 875    self.YMX_list =YMX_list
 876    self.index_list = index_list
 877        
 878        
 879        
 880        
 881        
 882def forecast(self, H, conditionals = None):
 883    
 884    '''
 885    Method to generate the forecasts in the highest frequency.\n
 886    
 887    Parameters
 888    ----------
 889    H : int
 890        Forecast horizon in highest frequnecy
 891    conditionals : pandas DataFrame or None
 892        Conditional forecasts\n
 893        column names must be the variable names\n
 894        no index needed\n
 895        either values or np.nan
 896    
 897    '''
 898    self.H = H
 899    # First we need to extend the index
 900    # depending on the highest frequencies the approach differs
 901    
 902    if self.frequencies[-1] == "D":
 903        
 904        self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1].append(pd.date_range(start=self.index_list[-1][-1] + Day(), periods=H, freq='D'))
 905
 906        # Function to check if a month has more than 20 days
 907        def has_more_than_20_days(month, dti):
 908            return sum(dti.to_period('M') == month) > 20
 909
 910        # Function to remove the last day of a month
 911        def remove_last_day_of_month(month, dti):
 912            return dti[~((dti.to_period('M') == month) & (dti.day > 20))]
 913
 914        # Check each month in extended_dti
 915        for month in self.index_list[-1].to_period('M').unique():
 916            # If a month has more than 20 days
 917            while has_more_than_20_days(month, self.index_list[-1]):
 918                # Remove the last day of that month
 919                self.index_list[-1] = remove_last_day_of_month(month, self.index_list[-1])
 920                # Add an additional day at the end
 921                self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1].append(pd.DatetimeIndex([self.index_list[-1][-1] + Day()]))
 922    
 923    if self.frequencies[-1] == 'W':
 924        self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1].append(pd.date_range(start=self.index_list[-1][-1] + Week(), periods=H, freq='W-MON'))
 925
 926        # Function to check if a month has more than 4 weeks
 927        def has_more_than_4_weeks(month, dti):
 928            return sum(dti.to_period('M') == month) > 4
 929
 930        # Function to remove the last week of a month
 931        def remove_last_week_of_month(month, dti):
 932            return dti[~((dti.to_period('M') == month) & (dti.day > 28))]
 933
 934        # Check each month in extended_dti
 935        for month in self.index_list[-1].to_period('M').unique():
 936            # If a month has more than 4 weeks
 937            while has_more_than_4_weeks(month, self.index_list[-1]):
 938                # Remove the last week of that month
 939                self.index_list[-1] = remove_last_week_of_month(month, self.index_list[-1])
 940                # Add an additional week at the end
 941                self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1].append(pd.DatetimeIndex([self.index_list[-1][-1] + Week()]))
 942                
 943    if self.frequencies[-1] == 'M':
 944        self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1].append(pd.date_range(start=self.index_list[-1][-1] + MonthBegin(), periods=12, freq='MS'))
 945    
 946    if self.frequencies[-1] == 'Q':
 947        self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1].append(pd.date_range(start=self.index_list[-1][-1] + QuarterBegin(), periods=H, freq='QS'))
 948        
 949    
 950    # Now we need to look at the conditional forecasts:
 951    
 952    YYcond = pd.DataFrame(np.nan, index =  self.index_list[-1][-H:], columns= self.varlist_list[-1])
 953    
 954    if conditionals is not None:
 955        conditionals.index = YYcond.index[:len(conditionals.index)]
 956        
 957        YYcond.update(conditionals)
 958        YYcond = np.array(YYcond) 
 959        YYcond[:,(self.select_list[-1] == 1)] = YYcond[:,(self.select_list[-1] == 1)]/100
 960        YYcond[:,(self.select_list[-1] == 0)] = np.log(YYcond[:,(self.select_list[-1] == 0)])
 961    exc = ~np.isnan(YYcond)
 962        
 963    YY_m_list = deque()
 964    YY_med_list = deque()
 965    YY_095_list = deque()
 966    YY_005_list = deque()
 967    YY_084_list = deque()
 968    YY_016_list = deque()
 969    forecast_draws_list = deque()
 970    
 971    
 972    H_= int(self.H)
 973            
 974    #Prepare index for output
 975    self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1][self.index_list[-1].shape[0]-(self.lstate_list[-1].shape[2]+H_):]
 976
 977    ###############  
 978    # Forecasting #
 979    ###############
 980    
 981    # store forecasts in monthly frequency
 982    YYvector_ml  = np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),H_,self.Nm_list[-1]+self.Nq_list[-1]))     # collects now/forecast      
 983    
 984    # store forecasts in quarterly frequency
 985    YYvector_ql  = np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),int(self.H/self.freq_ratio_list[-1]),self.Nm_list[-1]+self.Nq_list[-1]))   
 986    YYvector_qg  = np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),int(self.H/self.freq_ratio_list[-1]),self.Nm_list[-1]+self.Nq_list[-1]))
 987    
 988    print(" ", end = '\n')
 989    print("Multiple Frequency BVAR: Forecasting", end = "\n")
 990    print("Forecast Horizon: ", H_, end = "\n")
 991    print("Total Draws: ", self.nsim)
 992    
 993    
 994    for jj in tqdm(range(round((self.nsim)/self.thining))):
 995        
 996        YYact = np.squeeze(self.YYactsim_list[-1][jj, -1, :])
 997        XXact = np.squeeze(self.XXactsim_list[-1][jj, -1, :])
 998        post_phi = np.squeeze(self.Phip_list[-1][jj,:,:])
 999        post_sig = np.squeeze(self.Sigmap_list[-1][jj,:,:])
1000        
1001
1002        # Bayesian Estimation Forecasting 
1003        ###################################
1004
1005        
1006        YYpred = np.zeros((H_+1, self.nv_list[-1])) # forecasts from VAR
1007        YYpred[0,:] = YYact
1008        XXpred = np.zeros((H_+1, self.nv_list[-1]*self.nlags_list[-1]+1))
1009        XXpred[:,-1] = np.full((H_+1), fill_value = 1)
1010        XXpred[0,:] = XXact
1011        
1012        # given posterior draw, draw number (H+1) random sequence
1013
1014        error_pred = np.zeros((H_+1, self.nv_list[-1]))
1015        
1016        for h in range(H_+1):
1017            if post_sig.size > 1:
1018                error_pred[h,:] = np.random.default_rng().multivariate_normal(mean = np.zeros(self.nv_list[-1]), cov = post_sig, method = "cholesky")
1019            else:
1020                error_pred[h,:] = np.random.default_rng().normal(loc = 0, scale = post_sig)
1021        # given posterior draw, iterate forward to construct forecasts
1022        
1023        for h in range(1,H_+1):
1024            
1025            XXpred[h,self.nv_list[-1]:-1] = XXpred[h-1, :-self.nv_list[-1]-1]
1026            XXpred[h, :self.nv_list[-1]] = YYpred[h-1, :]
1027            #YYpred[h,:] = (XXpred[h,:] @ post_phi + error_pred[h,:])
1028            YYpred[h,:] = (1-exc[h-1,:]) * (XXpred[h,:] @ post_phi + error_pred[h,:]) + exc[h-1,:] * np.nan_to_num(YYcond[h-1,:])
1029        
1030        YYpred1 = copy.deepcopy(YYpred)
1031        YYpred = YYpred[1:,:]
1032        
1033
1034        
1035        
1036        # Now-/Forecasts
1037        # Store in hf
1038        YYvector_ml[jj,:,:] = YYpred
1039        
1040    forecast_draws_list.append(YYvector_ml)
1041    
1042    #mean
1043    YYftr_m = np.nanmean(YYvector_ml[self.nburn:,:,:], axis = 0)
1044    YYftr_m[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYftr_m[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1045    YYftr_m[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYftr_m[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1046    
1047    YYnow_m = np.mean(self.YYactsim_list[-1][self.nburn:,1:(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]], axis = 0) # actual/nowcast monthlies
1048    if YYnow_m.size:
1049        YYnow_m[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_m[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1050        YYnow_m[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_m[:,(self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1051    
1052    lstate_m = np.mean(self.lstate_list[-1][self.nburn:,:,:], axis = 0).T # hf obs for lf vars
1053    lstate_m[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_m[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1054    lstate_m[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_m[:, (self.select_q[-1]== 0)[0]])
1055    
1056
1057    
1058    YMh_len_correction = int(self.YMh_list[-1].shape[0] - lstate_m[:-(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]),:].shape[0])
1059    
1060    if self.YMh_list[-1].size:
1061        self.YMh_list[-1][:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * self.YMh_list[-1][:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1062        self.YMh_list[-1][:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] =  np.exp(self.YMh_list[-1][:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1063    
1064    if self.YMh_list[-1].size:
1065        YY_m_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((self.YMh_list[-1][YMh_len_correction:,:], lstate_m[:-(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]),:])), np.hstack((YYnow_m, lstate_m[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_m)))
1066        #YY_m_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((self.YMh_list[-1], lstate_m[:-(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]),:])), np.hstack((YYnow_m, lstate_m[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_m)))
1067    else:
1068        YY_m_list.append(np.vstack((lstate_m,YYftr_m)))
1069    
1070    
1071    
1072    
1073    #self.mean_phi = np.mean(self.Phip, axis = 0)
1074    
1075    #median
1076    YYftr_med = np.nanmedian(YYvector_ml[self.nburn:,:,:], axis = 0)
1077    YYftr_med[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYftr_med[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1078    YYftr_med[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYftr_med[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1079    
1080    YYnow_med = np.median(self.YYactsim_list[-1][self.nburn:,1:(self.freq_ratio+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]], axis = 0) # actual/nowcast monthlies
1081    
1082    if YYnow_med.size:
1083        YYnow_med[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_med[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1084        YYnow_med[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_med[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1085    
1086    lstate_med = np.median(self.lstate_list[-1][self.nburn:,:,:], axis = 0).T # hf obs for lf vars
1087    lstate_med[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_med[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1088    lstate_med[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_med[:, (self.select_q[-1]== 0)[0]])
1089    
1090    if self.YMh_list[-1].size:
1091        YY_med_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((self.YMh_list[-1][YMh_len_correction:,:], lstate_med[:-self.freq_ratio_list[-1],:])), np.hstack((YYnow_med, lstate_m[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_med)))
1092    else:
1093        YY_med_list.append(np.vstack((lstate_med,YYftr_med)))
1094        
1095    # safe uncertainty
1096    # 95%
1097    YYftr_095 = np.nanquantile(YYvector_ml[self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.95 ,axis = 0)
1098    YYftr_095[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYftr_095[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1099    YYftr_095[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYftr_095[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1100    
1101    YYnow_095 = np.quantile(self.YYactsim_list[-1][self.nburn:,1:(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]], q = 0.95, axis = 0) # actual/nowcast monthlies
1102    if YYnow_095.size:
1103        YYnow_095[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_095[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1104        YYnow_095[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_095[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1105    
1106    lstate_095 = np.quantile(self.lstate_list[-1][self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.95, axis = 0).T # hf obs for lf vars
1107    lstate_095[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_095[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1108    lstate_095[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_095[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]])
1109    
1110    YMna = np.full(self.YMh_list[-1].shape, np.nan)
1111    
1112    if YMna.size:
1113        YY_095_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((YMna[YMh_len_correction:,:],lstate_095[:-self.freq_ratio_list[-1],:])), np.hstack((YYnow_095, lstate_095[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_095)))
1114    else:
1115        YY_095_list.append(np.vstack((lstate_095,YYftr_095)))
1116    
1117    # 84%
1118    YYftr_084 = np.nanquantile(YYvector_ml[self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.84 ,axis = 0)
1119    YYftr_084[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYftr_084[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1120    YYftr_084[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYftr_084[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1121    
1122    YYnow_084 = np.quantile(self.YYactsim_list[-1][self.nburn:,1:(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]], q = 0.84, axis = 0) # actual/nowcast monthlies
1123    if YYnow_084.size:
1124        YYnow_084[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_084[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1125        YYnow_084[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_084[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1126    
1127    lstate_084 = np.quantile(self.lstate_list[-1][self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.84, axis = 0).T # hf obs for lf vars
1128    lstate_084[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_084[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1129    lstate_084[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_084[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]])
1130    
1131    YMna = np.full(self.YMh_list[-1].shape, np.nan)
1132    
1133    if YMna.size:
1134        YY_084_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((YMna[YMh_len_correction:,:],lstate_084[:-self.freq_ratio_list[-1],:])), np.hstack((YYnow_084, lstate_084[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_084)))
1135    else:
1136        YY_084_list.append(np.vstack((lstate_084,YYftr_084)))
1137        
1138    # 16%
1139    
1140    YYftr_016 = np.nanquantile(YYvector_ml[self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.16 ,axis = 0)
1141    YYftr_016[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYftr_016[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1142    YYftr_016[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYftr_016[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1143    
1144    YYnow_016 = np.quantile(self.YYactsim_list[-1][self.nburn:,1:(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]], q = 0.16, axis = 0) # actual/nowcast monthlies
1145    if YYnow_016.size:
1146        YYnow_016[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_016[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1147        YYnow_016[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_016[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1148    
1149    lstate_016 = np.quantile(self.lstate_list[-1][self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.16, axis = 0).T # hf obs for lf vars
1150    lstate_016[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_016[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1151    lstate_016[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_016[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]])
1152    
1153    YMna = np.full(self.YMh_list[-1].shape, np.nan)
1154    
1155    if YMna.size:
1156        YY_016_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((YMna[YMh_len_correction:,:],lstate_016[:-self.freq_ratio_list[-1],:])), np.hstack((YYnow_016, lstate_016[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_016)))
1157    else:
1158        YY_016_list.append(np.vstack((lstate_016,YYftr_016)))
1159    
1160    
1161    # 5%    
1162    
1163    YYftr_005 = np.nanquantile(YYvector_ml[self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.05 ,axis = 0)
1164    YYftr_005[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYftr_005[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1165    YYftr_005[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYftr_005[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1166    
1167    YYnow_005 = np.quantile(self.YYactsim_list[-1][self.nburn:,1:(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]], q = 0.05, axis = 0) # actual/nowcast monthlies
1168    
1169    if YYnow_005.size:   
1170        YYnow_005[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_005[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1171        YYnow_005[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_005[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1172    
1173    lstate_005 = np.quantile(self.lstate_list[-1][self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.05, axis = 0).T # hf obs for lf vars
1174    lstate_005[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_005[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1175    lstate_005[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_005[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]])
1176    
1177    if YMna.size:
1178        YY_005_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((YMna[YMh_len_correction:,:], lstate_005[:-self.freq_ratio_list[-1],:])), np.hstack((YYnow_005, lstate_005[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_005)))
1179    else:
1180        YY_005_list.append(np.vstack((lstate_005,YYftr_005)))
1181            
1182    YY_mean_pd = pd.DataFrame(YY_m_list[-1], columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1183    YY_mean_pd.index = self.index_list[-1]
1184    
1185    YY_median_pd = pd.DataFrame(YY_med_list[-1], columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1186    YY_median_pd.index = self.index_list[-1]
1187    
1188    YY_095_pd = pd.DataFrame(YY_095_list[-1], columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1189    YY_095_pd.index = self.index_list[-1]
1190    
1191    YY_005_pd = pd.DataFrame(YY_005_list[-1], columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1192    YY_005_pd.index = self.index_list[-1]
1193    
1194    YY_084_pd = pd.DataFrame(YY_084_list[-1], columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1195    YY_084_pd.index = self.index_list[-1]
1196    
1197    YY_016_pd = pd.DataFrame(YY_016_list[-1], columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1198    YY_016_pd.index = self.index_list[-1]
1199
1200    self.YY_095 = YY_095_list
1201    self.YY_084 = YY_084_list
1202    self.YY_016 = YY_016_list
1203    self.YY_005 = YY_005_list
1204    self.YY_mean = YY_m_list
1205    self.YY_median = YY_med_list
1206    self.forecast_draws_list = forecast_draws_list
1207    
1208    self.YY_mean_pd = YY_mean_pd
1209    self.YY_median_pd = YY_median_pd
1210    self.YY_095_pd = YY_095_pd
1211    self.YY_005_pd = YY_005_pd
1212    self.YY_084_pd = YY_084_pd
1213    self.YY_016_pd = YY_016_pd
1214        
1215        
1216def aggregate(self, frequency, reset_index = True):
1217    
1218    '''
1219    Aggregates the Mean, Median and quantililes in the highest frequency to the desired frequency. \n
1220    The Function ensures, that we start at the beginning of a Year or Quarter depending on the chosen frequency \n
1221    
1222    Parameters
1223    ----------
1224    frequency : str
1225        The frequency to which the data should be aggregated to
1226    reset_index : boolean
1227        Schould index be changed to period Index
1228
1229    '''
1230    if self.forecast_draws_list is None :
1231            sys.exit("Error: To gaggregate generate forecasts first")
1232            
1233    if frequency not in ["Y","Q"] :
1234            sys.exit("Error: Aggregation currently only implemented for aggregation to yearly and quarterly frequency")
1235    freq_lf = frequency
1236    freq_hf = self.frequencies[-1]
1237    
1238    YY_full_list = deque()
1239    YY_full_list_agg = deque()
1240    
1241    YYnow = copy.copy(self.YYactsim_list[-1])# actual/nowcast
1242    lstate = copy.copy(self.lstate_list[-1]) # hf obs for lf vars
1243    
1244    
1245    YMh_len_correction = int(self.YMh_list[-1].shape[0] - lstate[0][:,:-(self.freq_ratio_list[-1])].shape[1])
1246    
1247    if self.YMh_list[-1].size:
1248        for i in range(self.nsim):
1249            lstate_temp = lstate[i].T
1250            lstate_temp[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_temp[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1251            lstate_temp[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_temp[:, (self.select_q[-1]== 0)[0]])
1252            YYnow_temp = YYnow[i][1:(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]]
1253            YYnow_temp[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_temp[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1254            YYnow_temp[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_temp[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1255            forecast_draws_temp = copy.copy(self.forecast_draws_list[-1][i,:,:])
1256            forecast_draws_temp[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * forecast_draws_temp[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1257            forecast_draws_temp[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(forecast_draws_temp[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1258
1259            temp = np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((self.YMh_list[-1][YMh_len_correction:,:], lstate_temp[:-(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]), :])), np.hstack((YYnow_temp, lstate_temp[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), forecast_draws_temp))
1260            temp = pd.DataFrame(temp, columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1261            temp.index = self.index_list[-1]
1262            YY_full_list.append(temp)
1263    else:
1264        for i in range(self.nsim):
1265            temp = np.vstack((lstate[i,:,:],self.forecast_draws_list[i,:,:]))
1266            temp = pd.DataFrame(temp, columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1267            temp.index = self.index_list[-1]
1268            YY_full_list.append(temp)
1269    
1270    
1271    def find_first_position(arr, numbers, count):
1272        for i in range(len(arr) - count + 1):
1273            if arr[i] in numbers and all(arr[i] == arr[j] for j in range(i+1, i+count)):
1274                return i
1275    
1276    
1277            
1278    def agg_helper(freq_lf, freq_hf, df):
1279        # Set the frequency ratio        
1280        if freq_hf == "Q" and freq_lf == "Y":
1281            freq_ratio = 4
1282        elif freq_hf == "M" and freq_lf == "Y":
1283            freq_ratio = 12
1284        elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "Y":
1285            freq_ratio = 48
1286        elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "Y":
1287            freq_ratio = 260
1288        elif freq_hf == "M" and freq_lf == "Q":
1289            freq_ratio = 3
1290        elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "Q":
1291            freq_ratio = 12
1292        elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "M":
1293            freq_ratio = 4
1294        elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "W":
1295            freq_ratio = 5
1296        elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "M":
1297            freq_ratio = 20
1298                
1299        if frequency == 'Q':
1300            if freq_hf == 'W':
1301                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1, 4, 7, 10], 4 )
1302            elif freq_hf == 'M':
1303                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1, 4, 7, 10], 1)
1304            elif freq_hf == 'D':
1305                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1, 4, 7, 10], 20)
1306        elif frequency == 'Y':
1307            if freq_hf == 'Q':
1308                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1,3], 1 )
1309            elif freq_hf == 'M':
1310                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1], 1)
1311            elif freq_hf == 'W':
1312                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1], 4)
1313            elif freq_hf == 'D':
1314                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1], 20)
1315        return freq_ratio, start
1316    
1317    
1318    freq_ratio, start = agg_helper(freq_lf, freq_hf, YY_full_list[0])
1319    print("Aggregating for each draw")
1320    for i in tqdm(range(self.nburn, self.nsim)):
1321        temp = YY_full_list[i].iloc[start:,].groupby(YY_full_list[i].iloc[start:,].reset_index().index // freq_ratio).filter(lambda x: len(x) == freq_ratio)
1322        temp = temp.groupby(temp.reset_index().index // freq_ratio).mean()
1323        temp.index = YY_full_list[i].iloc[start:,].index[::freq_ratio][:temp.shape[0]]
1324        temp.index = temp.index.map(lambda x: x.replace(day=1))
1325        YY_full_list_agg.append(temp)
1326        
1327    self.YY_mean_agg = pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).groupby(pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).index).mean()
1328    self.YY_median_agg = pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).groupby(pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).index).median()
1329    self.YY_095_agg = pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).groupby(pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).index).quantile(0.95)
1330    self.YY_005_agg = pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).groupby(pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).index).quantile(0.05)
1331    self.YY_084_agg = pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).groupby(pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).index).quantile(0.84)
1332    self.YY_016_agg = pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).groupby(pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).index).quantile(0.16)
1333    
1334    hist = copy.copy(self.input_data)
1335    hist.appendleft(self.input_data_Q)
1336    i = 0
1337    for m in self.frequencies:
1338        if self.frequencies.index(m) == self.frequencies.index(frequency):
1339            # history ersetzen durch originaldaten 
1340            # interval durch NA
1341            idx = self.YY_mean_agg.index.intersection(hist[i].index, sort=False)
1342            self.YY_mean_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = hist[i].loc[idx, hist[i].columns]
1343            self.YY_median_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = hist[i].loc[idx, hist[i].columns]
1344            self.YY_095_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1345            self.YY_005_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1346            self.YY_084_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1347            self.YY_016_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1348            
1349        if self.frequencies.index(m) > self.frequencies.index(frequency) & self.frequencies.index(m) < len(self.frequencies)-1:
1350            freq_ratio_temp, start_temp = agg_helper(frequency, m, hist[i])
1351            hist_agg = hist[i].iloc[start_temp:,].groupby(hist[i].iloc[start_temp:,].reset_index().index // freq_ratio_temp).filter(lambda x: len(x) == freq_ratio_temp)
1352            hist_agg = hist_agg.groupby(hist_agg.reset_index().index // freq_ratio_temp).mean()
1353            hist_agg.index = hist[i].iloc[start_temp:,].index[::freq_ratio_temp][:hist_agg.shape[0]]
1354            hist_agg.index = hist_agg.index.map(lambda x: x.replace(day=1))
1355            
1356            idx = hist_agg.index.intersection(self.YY_mean_agg.index, sort=False)
1357            self.YY_mean_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = hist_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns]
1358            self.YY_median_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = hist_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns]
1359            self.YY_095_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1360            self.YY_005_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1361            self.YY_084_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1362            self.YY_016_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1363        
1364        i = i+1
1365    
1366    if reset_index == True:
1367        index_new = pd.PeriodIndex(self.YY_mean_agg.index, freq= frequency)
1368        self.YY_mean_agg.index = index_new
1369        self.YY_median_agg.index = index_new
1370        self.YY_095_agg.index = index_new
1371        self.YY_005_agg.index = index_new
1372        self.YY_084_agg.index = index_new
1373        self.YY_016_agg.index = index_new
1374    
1375    self.agg_freq = frequency
tqdm = functools.partial(<class 'tqdm.std.tqdm'>, position=0, leave=True)
def fit(self, mufbvar_data, hyp): 
 52def fit(self, mufbvar_data, hyp):
 53    
 54    '''
 55    Estimates the model using the model parameter specified in the initialization. \n
 56    And the data provided. 
 57    
 58    Parameters
 59    ----------
 60    mufbvar_data : mufbvar_data class object 
 61        data in the form of a mufbvar_data class object
 62    hyp : list of list
 63        list containing list of the hyperparameters for each frequency step\n
 64        1. overall tightness\n
 65        2. scaling down the variance for the coefficients of a distant lag\n
 66        3. number of observations used for obtaining the prior for the covariance matrix of error terms\n
 67        4. tuning parameter for coefficients for constant\n
 68        5. tuning parameter for the covariance between coefficients\n
 69
 70    '''
 71    
 72    self.nex = 1
 73    self.hyp = hyp
 74    
 75    # data from mufbvar_data
 76    
 77    YMX_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YMX_list)
 78    YM0_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YM0_list)
 79    select_m_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_m_list)
 80    vars_m_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.vars_m_list)
 81    YMh_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YMh_list)
 82    index_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.index_list)
 83    frequencies = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.frequencies)
 84    self.frequencies = frequencies
 85    YQX_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YQX_list)
 86    YQ0_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YQ0_list)
 87    select_q = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_q)
 88    input_data_Q =  copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.input_data_Q)
 89    self.input_data_Q = input_data_Q
 90    varlist_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.varlist_list)
 91    select_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_list)
 92    select_c_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_c_list)
 93    Nm_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.Nm_list)
 94    nv_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.nv_list)
 95    Nq_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.Nq_list)
 96    select_list_sep = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.select_list_sep)
 97    freq_ratio_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.freq_ratio_list)
 98    YQ_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YQ_list)
 99    Tstar_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.Tstar_list)
100    T_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.T_list)
101    YDATA_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YDATA_list)
102    YM_list = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.YM_list)
103    input_data = copy.deepcopy(mufbvar_data.input_data)
104    self.input_data = input_data
105    
106    nburn = round((self.nburn_perc)*self.nsim)
107    self.nburn = nburn
108    
109    #test if nlags for each step is at least frequency ratio
110    for i in range(len(freq_ratio_list)):
111        if deque(self.nlags)[i] < freq_ratio_list[i]:
112            sys.exit("The number of lags at each step must be at least as long as the corresponding frequency ratio")
113    
114    # fit the model
115    ###############
116    
117    nlags_list_ = self.nlags
118    
119    # Initialize Matrices
120    #########################
121    
122    # here we initialize all the matrixes for the sampling for all frequencies
123    # we again create lists and append them, in the sample loop we can then
124    # access these matrices 
125    
126    #create empty lists, so we can append to them
127    T0_list = deque()
128    p_list = deque()
129    nlags_list = deque()
130    kq_list = deque()
131    nobs_list = deque()
132    Tnew_list = deque()
133    Tnobs_list = deque()
134    
135    varstxt_list = deque()
136    smpltxt_list = deque()
137    
138    index_NY_list = deque()
139    
140    Sigmap_list    = deque()
141    Phip_list      = deque()
142    Cons_list      = deque()
143    lstate_list    = deque()
144    YYactsim_list  = deque()
145    XXactsim_list  = deque()
146    
147    At_mat_list    = deque()
148    Pt_mat_list    = deque()
149    Atildemat_list = deque()
150    Ptildemat_list = deque()
151    loglh_list   = deque()
152    counter_list = deque()
153    
154    phi_mm_list = deque()
155    
156    phi_mq_list = deque()
157    phi_mc_list = deque()
158    phi_qc_list = deque()
159    
160    Phi_list = deque()
161    
162    # Define Transition Equation Matrices in eq (10)
163    GAMMAs_list = deque()
164    
165    
166    GAMMAz_list = deque()
167    GAMMAc_list = deque()
168    GAMMAu_list = deque()
169
170    LAMBDAs_list = deque()
171    
172    LAMBDAz_list = deque()
173    LAMBDAc_list = deque()
174    LAMBDAu_list = deque()
175    
176    # Define Covariance Terms sig_mm, sig_mq_sig_qm, siq_qq
177    sigma_list = deque()
178    sig_mm_list = deque()
179    sig_mq_list = deque()
180    sig_qm_list = deque()
181    sig_qq_list = deque()
182    
183    # Define W matrix in eq (15) -- _t for tilde
184    Wmatrix_list = deque()
185    LAMBDAs_t_list = deque()
186    LAMBDAz_t_list = deque()
187    LAMBDAc_t_list = deque()
188    LAMBDAu_t_list = deque()
189    
190    At_list = deque()
191    At_draw_list = deque()
192    Pt_list = deque()
193    Pmean_list = deque()
194    
195    Zm_list = deque()
196    
197    Yq_list = deque()
198    Ym_list = deque()
199    
200    Pt_last_list = deque()
201    
202    YY_list = deque()
203    
204    #for i in range(len(YMh_list)):
205    T0_list.append(int(nlags_list_[0]))
206    p_list.append(int(nlags_list_[0]))
207    nlags_list.append(p_list[0])
208    kq_list.append(Nq_list[0] * p_list[0])
209    nobs_list.append(int(T_list[0]) - int(T0_list[0]))
210    Tnew_list.append(Tstar_list[0]-T_list[0])
211    Tnobs_list.append(Tstar_list[0]-T0_list[0])
212    
213
214    
215    #for writing to a forecast w/ history file
216    YMh_list[0] = YMh_list[0][int(T0_list[0]):-int(freq_ratio_list[0]),:]
217    varstxt_list.append(np.hstack((YMX_list[0].columns, YQX_list[0].columns)))
218    smpltxt_list.append(YMX_list[0].index[int(T0_list[0]):])
219    
220    index_NY_list.append(np.isnan(YDATA_list[0][nobs_list[0]+T0_list[0]:Tnobs_list[0]+T0_list[0],:]).T) # TODO CHECK
221    
222    # Parameter estimation
223    # Matrices for collecting draws from Posterior Density
224    Sigmap_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),nv_list[0],nv_list[0])))
225    Phip_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),int(nv_list[0])*int(p_list[0])+1,int(nv_list[0]))))
226    Cons_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),nv_list[0])))
227    lstate_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),Nq_list[0],int(Tnobs_list[0]))))
228    YYactsim_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),freq_ratio_list[0]+1,nv_list[0])))
229    XXactsim_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),int(freq_ratio_list[0])+1,int(nv_list[0])*int(p_list[0])+1)))
230    
231    At_mat_list.append(np.zeros((int(Tnobs_list[0]), Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1))))
232    Pt_mat_list.append(np.zeros((int(Tnobs_list[0]), (Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1))**2)))
233    Atildemat_list.append(np.zeros((self.nsim, Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1))))
234    Ptildemat_list.append(np.zeros((self.nsim, Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1),Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1))))
235    loglh_list.append(0)
236    counter_list.append(0)
237    
238    # Define phi, phi(mm), phi(mq), phi(mc) used in alt ss rep -- eq (9)
239    phi_mm_list.append(np.zeros((int(Nm_list[0])*int(p_list[0]),int(Nm_list[0]))))
