240    phi_mm_list[0][:Nm_list[0],:Nm_list[0]] = np.eye(Nm_list[0])
241    
242    phi_mq_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*int(p_list[0]),int(Nm_list[0]))))
243    phi_mc_list.append(np.zeros((1,Nm_list[0])))
244    phi_qc_list.append(np.zeros((1,Nq_list[0])))
245    
246    Phi_list.append(np.vstack((0.95 * np.eye(int(Nm_list[0])+Nq_list[0]), np.zeros(((int(Nm_list[0])+Nq_list[0])*(int(p_list[0])-1)+1, int(Nm_list[0])+Nq_list[0])))))
247    
248    # Define Transition Equation Matrices in eq (10)
249    GAMMAs_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*(int(p_list[0])+1), Nq_list[0] * (int(p_list[0])+1))))
250    IQ = np.eye(Nq_list[0])
251    
252    for j in range(int(p_list[0])):
253        GAMMAs_list[0][(j+1)*Nq_list[0]:(j+2)*Nq_list[0], j*Nq_list[0]:(j+1)*Nq_list[0]] = IQ
254        
255    GAMMAs_list[0][:Nq_list[0],:Nq_list[0]] = 0.95 * np.eye(Nq_list[0])
256    
257    GAMMAz_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]* (int(p_list[0])+1), int(Nm_list[0])*p_list[0])))
258    GAMMAc_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]+1), 1)))
259    GAMMAu_list.append(np.vstack((np.eye(Nq_list[0]), np.zeros((p_list[0]*Nq_list[0],Nq_list[0])))))
260
261    LAMBDAs_list.append(np.vstack((np.hstack((np.zeros((Nm_list[0],Nq_list[0])), np.transpose(phi_mq_list[0]))),1/freq_ratio_list[0]*np.hstack((np.tile(np.eye(Nq_list[0]), freq_ratio_list[0]), np.zeros((Nq_list[0],Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]-(freq_ratio_list[0]-1)))))))))
262    
263    LAMBDAz_list.append(np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mm_list[0]), np.zeros((Nq_list[0], p_list[0]*Nm_list[0])))))
264    LAMBDAc_list.append(np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mc_list[0]), np.zeros((Nq_list[0],1)))))
265    LAMBDAu_list.append(np.vstack((np.eye(Nm_list[0]), np.zeros((Nq_list[0],Nm_list[0])))))
266    
267    # Define Covariance Terms sig_mm, sig_mq_sig_qm, siq_qq
268    sigma_list.append((1e-4)*np.eye(Nm_list[0]+Nq_list[0]))
269    sig_mm_list.append(sigma_list[0][:Nm_list[0],:Nm_list[0]])
270    sig_mq_list.append(sigma_list[0][:Nm_list[0], Nm_list[0]:])
271    sig_qm_list.append(sigma_list[0][Nm_list[0]:, :Nm_list[0]])
272    sig_qq_list.append(sigma_list[0][Nm_list[0]:,Nm_list[0]:])
273    
274    # Define W matrix in eq (15) -- _t for tilde
275    
276    Wmatrix_list.append(np.hstack((np.eye(Nm_list[0]), np.zeros((Nm_list[0],Nq_list[0])))))
277    LAMBDAs_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[0] @ LAMBDAs_list[0])
278    LAMBDAz_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[0] @ LAMBDAz_list[0])
279    LAMBDAc_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[0] @ LAMBDAc_list[0])
280    LAMBDAu_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[0] @ LAMBDAu_list[0])
281    
282    At_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]+1))))
283    Pt_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]+1), Nq_list[0]*(p_list[0]+1))))
284    
285    for kk in range(5):
286        Pt_list[0] = GAMMAs_list[0] @ Pt_list[0] @ GAMMAs_list[0].T + GAMMAu_list[0] @ sig_qq_list[0] @ GAMMAu_list[0].T
287    
288    # Lagged HF observations
289    Zm_list.append(np.zeros((nobs_list[0], Nm_list[0]*p_list[0])))
290    
291    if Zm_list[0].size:
292        for j in range(p_list[0]):
293            Zm_list[0][:, j * Nm_list[0]:(j+1)*Nm_list[0]] = YM_list[0][T0_list[0]-(j+1):T0_list[0]+nobs_list[0]-(j+1),:]
294            
295    # Observations in Monthly Freq
296    
297    Ym_list.append(YM_list[0][T0_list[0]:nobs_list[0]+T0_list[0],:])
298        
299    Yq_list.append(YQ_list[0][T0_list[0]:nobs_list[0]+T0_list[0],:])
300    
301    
302    # Estimation
303    #################
304    print(" ", end = '\n')
305    print("Multi Frequency BVAR: Estimation", end = '\n')
306    print("Frequencies: ", self.frequencies, end = "\n")
307    print("Total Number of Draws: ",self.nsim)
308    
309    #Here we start the sample loop, j is the current sample
310    #inside the sample loop we need a loop for the MFBVARS: m
311    for j in tqdm(range(self.nsim)):
312        for m in range(len(YMh_list)):
313            
314            # initialization
315            if j > 0:
316                At_list[m] = At_draw_list[m][0,:].T 
317                Pt_list[m] = Pmean_list[m]
318                
319            # Kalman Filter Loop
320            #########################
321            
322            
323            for t in range(nobs_list[m]):  
324                
325                if Ym_list[m].size:
326                    
327                    if (t+1+T0_list[m])/freq_ratio_list[m] - np.floor((t+T0_list[m]+1)/freq_ratio_list[m]) == 0:
328                        At1 = At_list[m]
329                        Pt1 = Pt_list[m]
330                        # Forecasting
331                        alphahat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ At1 + GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
332                        Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Pt1 @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
333                        Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
334                        yhat = LAMBDAs_list[m] @ alphahat + LAMBDAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + LAMBDAc_list[m][:,0]
335                        nut = np.concatenate((Ym_list[m][t,:], Yq_list[m][t,:])) - yhat  
336                        Ft = (LAMBDAs_list[m] @ Phat @ LAMBDAs_list[m].T + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_list[m].T
337                            + LAMBDAs_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_list[m].T
338                            + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T @ LAMBDAs_list[m].T)
339                        Ft = 0.5*(Ft+Ft.T)
340                        Xit = LAMBDAs_list[m] @ Phat + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
341                        sol = Xit.T @ invert_matrix(Ft)
342                        At_list[m] = alphahat + sol @ nut
343                        Pt_list[m] = Phat - sol @ Xit
344                        At_mat_list[m][t,:] = At_list[m].T
345                        Pt_mat_list[m][t,:] = Pt_list[m].reshape((1, (Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1))**2), order = "F")
346                    else:
347                        At1 = At_list[m]
348                        Pt1 = Pt_list[m]
349                        # Forecasting
350                        alphahat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ At1 + GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
351                        Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Pt1 @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
352                        Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
353                        yhat = LAMBDAs_t_list[m] @ alphahat + LAMBDAz_t_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + LAMBDAc_t_list[m][:,0]
354                    
355                        nut = Ym_list[m][t,:] - yhat
356                        Ft = (LAMBDAs_t_list[m] @ Phat @ LAMBDAs_t_list[m].T + LAMBDAu_t_list[m] @ sig_mm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_t_list[m].T
357                            + LAMBDAs_t_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_t_list[m].T
358                            + LAMBDAu_t_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T @ LAMBDAs_t_list[m].T)
359                        Ft = 0.5*(Ft+Ft.T)
360                        Xit = LAMBDAs_t_list[m] @ Phat + LAMBDAu_t_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
361                        sol = Xit.T @ invert_matrix(Ft)
362                        At_list[m] = alphahat + sol @ nut 
363                        Pt_list[m] = Phat - sol @ Xit
364                    
365                        At_mat_list[m][t,:] = At_list[m].T
366                        Pt_mat_list[m][t,:] = Pt_list[m].reshape((1, (Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1))**2), order = "F")
367                else:
368                    if (t+1+T0_list[m])/freq_ratio_list[m] - np.floor((t+T0_list[m]+1)/freq_ratio_list[m]) == 0:
369                        At1 = At_list[m]
370                        Pt1 = Pt_list[m]
371                        # Forecasting
372                        alphahat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ At1 + GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
373                        Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Pt1 @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
374                        Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
375                        yhat = LAMBDAs_list[m] @ alphahat + LAMBDAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + LAMBDAc_list[m][:,0]
376                        nut = Yq_list[m][t,:] - yhat  
377                        Ft = (LAMBDAs_list[m] @ Phat @ LAMBDAs_list[m].T + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_list[m].T
378                            + LAMBDAs_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qm_list[m] @ LAMBDAu_list[m].T
379                            + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T @ LAMBDAs_list[m].T)
380                        Ft = 0.5*(Ft+Ft.T)
381                        Xit = LAMBDAs_list[m] @ Phat + LAMBDAu_list[m] @ sig_mq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
382                        sol = Xit.T @ invert_matrix(Ft)
383                        At_list[m] = alphahat + sol @ nut
384                        Pt_list[m] = Phat - sol @ Xit
385                        At_mat_list[m][t,:] = At_list[m].T
386                        Pt_mat_list[m][t,:] = Pt_list[m].reshape((1, (Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1))**2), order = "F")
387                    else:
388                        At1 = At_list[m]
389                        Pt1 = Pt_list[m]
390                        # Forecasting
391                        alphahat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ At1 + GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][t,:] + GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
392                        Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Pt1 @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
393                        Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
394                        At_list[m] = alphahat 
395                        Pt_list[m] = Phat 
396                        At_mat_list[m][t,:] = At_list[m].T
397                        Pt_mat_list[m][t,:] = Pt_list[m].reshape((1, (Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1))**2), order = "F")
398            Atildemat_list[m][j,:] = At_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-1,:]
399            
400            if j == 0:
401                Pt_last_list.append(Pt_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-1,:].reshape((Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1),Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1)), order = "F"))
402            else:
403                Pt_last_list[m] = Pt_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-1,:].reshape((Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1),Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1)), order = "F")
404            Ptildemat_list[m][j,:,:] = Pt_last_list[m]
405            
406            ########## Unbalanced Dataset ###########
407            
408            kn = nv_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1)
409            
410            # Measurement Equation
411            
412            Z1 = np.zeros((Nm_list[m], kn))
413            Z1[:,:Nm_list[m]] = np.eye(Nm_list[m])
414            
415            Z2 = np.zeros((Nq_list[m], kn))
416            
417            for bb in range(Nq_list[m]):
418                for ll in range(freq_ratio_list[m]):
419                    Z2[bb, (ll+1)*Nm_list[m]+ll*Nq_list[m]+bb] = 1/freq_ratio_list[m]
420            
421            ZZ = np.vstack((Z1,Z2))
422            
423            if Ym_list[m].size:
424                BAt = (np.concatenate((Ym_list[m][-1,:], np.atleast_1d(np.squeeze(Atildemat_list[m][j,:Nq_list[m]])))))
425                for rr in range(1,p_list[m]+1):
426                    BAt = np.concatenate((BAt,np.concatenate((Ym_list[m][-(rr+1),:], np.atleast_1d(np.squeeze(Atildemat_list[m][j,rr*Nq_list[m]:(rr+1)*Nq_list[m]]))))))
427            
428            else: 
429                BAt = np.atleast_1d(np.squeeze(Atildemat_list[m][j,:Nq_list[m]]))
430                for rr in range(1,p_list[m]+1):
431                    BAt = np.concatenate((BAt,np.atleast_1d(np.squeeze(Atildemat_list[m][j,rr*Nq_list[m]:(rr+1)*Nq_list[m]]))))
432            
433            BPt = np.zeros((kn,kn))
434            for rr in range(p_list[m]+1):
435                for vv in range(p_list[m]+1):
436                    BPt[(rr+1)*Nm_list[m]+rr*Nq_list[m]:(rr+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]), (vv+1)*Nm_list[m]+vv*Nq_list[m]:(vv+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])] = np.squeeze(
437                        Ptildemat_list[m][j,rr*Nq_list[m]:(rr+1)*Nq_list[m],vv*Nq_list[m]:(vv+1)*Nq_list[m]])
438                    
439            BAt_mat = np.zeros((Tnobs_list[m], kn))
440            BPt_mat = np.zeros((Tnobs_list[m], kn**2))
441            
442            
443            BAt_mat[nobs_list[m]-1,:] = BAt
444            BPt_mat[nobs_list[m]-1,:] = BPt.reshape((1,kn**2), order = "F")
445            
446            # Define companion form matrix PHIF
447            PHIF = np.zeros((kn,kn))
448            IF = np.eye(nv_list[m])
449            for i in range(p_list[m]):
450                PHIF[(i+1)*nv_list[m]:(i+2)*nv_list[m], i*nv_list[m]:(i+1)*nv_list[m]] = IF
451                
452            PHIF[:nv_list[m], :nv_list[m]*p_list[m]] = Phi_list[m][:-1,:].T
453            
454            # Define constant term CONF
455            CONF = np.hstack((Phi_list[m][-1,:].T, np.zeros((nv_list[m]*p_list[m]))))
456            
457            # Define covariance term SIGF
458            SIGF = np.zeros((kn,kn))
459            SIGF[:nv_list[m],:nv_list[m]] = sigma_list[m]
460            
461            # Filter Loop
462            ###################
463            
464            for t in range(nobs_list[m], Tnobs_list[m]):
465                
466                #new indicator
467                kkk = t-nobs_list[m]
468                
469                # Define new data (ND) and new Z matrix (NZ)
470                ND = YDATA_list[m][nobs_list[m]+T0_list[m]+kkk,:][~np.isnan(YDATA_list[m][nobs_list[m]+T0_list[m]+kkk,:])]
471                NZ = ZZ[~index_NY_list[m][:,kkk],:]
472                
473                BAt1 = BAt
474                BPt1 = BPt
475                
476                # Forecasting
477                Balphahat = PHIF @ BAt1 + CONF
478                BPhat = PHIF @ BPt1 @ PHIF.T + SIGF
479                BPhat = 0.5 * (BPhat+BPhat.T)
480                
481                Byhat = NZ @ Balphahat
482                Bnut = ND - Byhat
483                
484                BFt = NZ @ BPhat @ NZ.T
485                BFt = 0.5*(BFt+BFt.T)
486                
487                #Updating
488                sol_1 = (BPhat @ NZ.T) @ invert_matrix(BFt)
489                BAt = Balphahat + sol_1 @ Bnut
490                BPt = BPhat - sol_1 @ (BPhat @ NZ.T).T
491                BAt_mat[t,:] = BAt
492                BPt_mat[t,:] = BPt.reshape((1,kn**2), order = "F")
493                
494                
495            AT_draw = np.zeros((Tnew_list[m]+1, kn))
496            
497            # Draw from multivariate normal
498            Pchol = cholcovOrEigendecomp(BPt_mat[Tnobs_list[m]-1,:].reshape((kn, kn), order = "F"))
499            AT_draw[-1, :] = BAt_mat[Tnobs_list[m]-1,:]+np.transpose(Pchol @ np.random.standard_normal(kn))
500            
501            # Kalman Smoother
502            #####################
503            
504            for i in range(Tnew_list[m]):
505                
506                BAtt = BAt_mat[Tnobs_list[m]-(i+2),:]
507                BPtt = BPt_mat[Tnobs_list[m]-(i+2),:].reshape((kn,kn), order = "F")
508                
509                BPhat = PHIF @ BPtt @ PHIF.T + SIGF
510                BPhat = 0.5*(BPhat+BPhat.T)
511                
512                inv_BPhat = invert_matrix(BPhat)
513                
514                Bnut = AT_draw[-(i+1),:]- PHIF @ BAtt - CONF
515                
516                Amean = BAtt + (BPtt @ PHIF.T) @ inv_BPhat @ Bnut
517                Pmean = BPtt - (BPtt @ PHIF.T) @ inv_BPhat @ np.transpose(BPtt @ PHIF.T)        
518        
519                #Draw from multivariate normal
520                Pmchol = cholcovOrEigendecomp(Pmean)
521                AT_draw[-2-i,:] = np.transpose(Amean + Pmchol @ np.random.standard_normal(kn))
522                
523            ########## Balanced Dataset ###########
524            
525            At_draw = np.zeros((nobs_list[m], Nq_list[m] * (p_list[m]+1)))
526            for kk in range(p_list[m]+1):
527                At_draw[nobs_list[m]-1, kk * Nq_list[m]:(kk+1)*+Nq_list[m]] = AT_draw[0,(kk+1)*Nm_list[m] + kk*Nq_list[m]:(kk+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])]
528                
529        
530            # Kalman Smoother
531            #####################
532            
533            for i in range(nobs_list[m]-1):
534                Att = At_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-(i+2),:]#[:, np.newaxis]
535                Ptt = Pt_mat_list[m][nobs_list[m]-(i+2),:].reshape(Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1), Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1), order = "F")
536                
537                
538                Phat = GAMMAs_list[m] @ Ptt @ GAMMAs_list[m].T + GAMMAu_list[m] @ sig_qq_list[m] @ GAMMAu_list[m].T
539                
540                Phat = 0.5*(Phat + Phat.T)
541                
542                inv_Phat = invert_matrix(Phat)
543                
544                nut = At_draw[nobs_list[m]-(i+1), :] - GAMMAs_list[m] @ Att - GAMMAz_list[m] @ Zm_list[m][nobs_list[m]-1-(i+1)] - GAMMAc_list[m][:,0]
545
546                
547                temp = Ptt @ GAMMAs_list[m].T
548                Amean = Att + temp @ inv_Phat @ nut
549                Pmean = Ptt - temp @ inv_Phat @ np.transpose(temp)
550                
551                Pmchol = cholcovOrEigendecomp(Pmean)
552                At_draw[nobs_list[m]-1-(i+1), :] = np.transpose(Amean + Pmchol @ np.random.standard_normal(Nq_list[m]*(p_list[m]+1)))
553            
554        
555        
556            # Minesota Prior                            
557            ########################
558            if Ym_list[m].size:
559                YY = np.vstack((np.hstack((Ym_list[m], At_draw[:,:Nq_list[m]])), AT_draw[1:,:(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])]))
560            else:
561                YY = np.vstack((At_draw[:,:Nq_list[m]], AT_draw[1:,:(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])]))
562        
563            
564            #lstate = np.zeros((Nq_list[m], Tnobs_list[m]))
565            #for hh in range(Nq_list[m]):
566            #    lstate[hh, :nobs_list[m]] = At_draw[:, hh]
567            #    lstate[hh, nobs_list[m]:] = AT_draw[1:, Nm_list[m]+hh]
568        
569            if (j%self.thining == 0):
570                for hh in range(Nq_list[m]):
571                    lstate_list[m][int(int((j)/self.thining)), hh, :nobs_list[m]] = At_draw[:, hh]
572                    lstate_list[m][int(int((j)/self.thining)), hh, nobs_list[m]:] = AT_draw[1:, Nm_list[m]+hh]
573    
574            nobs_ = np.shape(YY)[0] - T0_list[m]
575            spec = np.hstack((nlags_list_[m], T0_list[m], self.nex, nv_list[m], nobs_))
576        
577        
578            # dummy observations and actual observations
579            #mdd, YYact, YYdum, XXact, XXdum = mdd_(self.hyp, YY, spec)
580            YYact, YYdum, XXact, XXdum = calc_yyact(self.hyp[m], YY, spec)
581            
582            if (j%self.thining == 0):
583                YYactsim_list[m][int(int((j)/self.thining)),:,:] = YYact[-(freq_ratio_list[m]+1):,:] #TODO
584                XXactsim_list[m][int(int((j)/self.thining)),:,:] = XXact[-(freq_ratio_list[m]+1):,:]
585            
586            
587            # Draws from posterior distribution
588            
589            Tdummy, n = YYdum.shape
590            n = int(n)
591            Tdummy = int(Tdummy)
592            Tobs, n = YYact.shape
593            X = np.vstack((XXact, XXdum))
594            Y = np.vstack((YYact, YYdum))
595            p = int(spec[0])
596            T = Tobs + Tdummy
597            F = np.zeros((int(n*p), int(n*p)))
598            I = np.eye(n)
599            
600            for i in range(p-1):
601                F[(i+1)*n:(i+2)*n, i*n:(i+1)*n] = I
602    
603            vl, d, vr = np.linalg.svd(X, full_matrices=False)
604            vr = vr.T
605            di = 1/d
606            B = vl.T @ Y
607            xxi = (vr * np.tile(di.T,(n*p+1,1))) 
608            inv_x = xxi @ xxi.T
609            Phi_tilde = xxi @ B
610    
611            Sigma = (Y - X @ Phi_tilde).T @ (Y - X @ Phi_tilde)
612            
613            # Draws from the density Sigma | Y 
614            sigma = invwishart.rvs(scale = Sigma, df = T-n*p-1)
615            
616            # Draws from density vec(Phi)|Sigma(j), Y
617            sigma_chol = cholcovOrEigendecomp(np.kron(sigma, inv_x))
618            phi_new =  np.squeeze(Phi_tilde.reshape(n*(n*p+1),1,order = "F")) + sigma_chol @ np.random.standard_normal(sigma_chol.shape[0])
619            
620            #phi_new = np.random.default_rng().multivariate_normal(mean = np.squeeze(Phi_tilde.reshape(n*(n*p+1),1,order = "F")), cov = np.kron(sigma, inv_x), method = "cholesky")
621            
622            Phi = phi_new.reshape(n*p+1,n,order = "F")
623            
624            if j > 0:
625                Phi_list[m] = Phi
626            elif j == 0 & m == 0:
627                Phi_list[m] = Phi
628            
629            if (j % self.thining == 0):
630                j_temp = int(j/self.thining)
631                Sigmap_list[m][j_temp,:,:] = sigma
632                Phip_list[m][j_temp,:,:]   = Phi
633                Cons_list[m][j_temp,:]     = Phi[-1,:]
634            
635            # Define phi(qm), phi(qq), phi(qc)
636            phi_qm = np.zeros((Nm_list[m]*p,Nq_list[m]))
637            for i in range(p_list[m]):
638                phi_qm[Nm_list[m]*i:Nm_list[m]*(i+1), :] = Phi[i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]):i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])+Nm_list[m],Nm_list[m]:]
639                
640            phi_qq = np.zeros((Nq_list[m]*p,Nq_list[m]))
641            for i in range(p):
642                phi_qq[Nq_list[m]*i:Nq_list[m]*(i+1), :] = Phi[i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])+Nm_list[m]:(i+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]), Nm_list[m]:]
643                
644            phi_qc = Phi[-1,Nm_list[m]:, np.newaxis]
645            
646            # Define  phi(mm), phi(mq), phi(mc)
647            phi_mm = np.zeros((Nm_list[m]*p, Nm_list[m]))
648            for i in range(p):
649                phi_mm[Nm_list[m]*i:Nm_list[m]*(i+1),:] = Phi[i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]):i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])+Nm_list[m],:Nm_list[m]]
650        
651            phi_mq = np.zeros((Nq_list[m]*p, Nm_list[m]))
652            for i in range(p):
653                phi_mq[Nq_list[m]*i:Nq_list[m]*(i+1),:] = Phi[i*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m])+Nm_list[m]:(i+1)*(Nm_list[m]+Nq_list[m]),:Nm_list[m]]      
654            
655            phi_mc = Phi[-1,:Nm_list[m], np.newaxis]
656        
657            # Define Covariance Term sig_mm, sig_mq, sig_qm, sig_qq
658            if Nm_list[m]:
659                sig_mm_list[m] = sigma[:Nm_list[m],:Nm_list[m]]  
660                sig_mq_list[m] = 0.5*(sigma[:Nm_list[m],Nm_list[m]:]+np.transpose(sigma[Nm_list[m]:,:Nm_list[m]]))
661                sig_qm_list[m] = 0.5*(sigma[Nm_list[m]:,:Nm_list[m]]+np.transpose(sigma[:Nm_list[m],Nm_list[m]:]))
662                sig_qq_list[m] = sigma[Nm_list[m]:,Nm_list[m]:]
663            else:
664                sig_qq_list[m] =  np.atleast_2d(sigma)
665            
666            
667            # Define Transition Equation Matrices
668            GAMMAs_list[m] = np.vstack((np.hstack((np.transpose(phi_qq), np.zeros((Nq_list[m],Nq_list[m])))), np.hstack((np.eye(p*Nq_list[m]), np.zeros((p*Nq_list[m],Nq_list[m]))))))
669            GAMMAz_list[m] = np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_qm), np.zeros((p*Nq_list[m], p*Nm_list[m]))))
670            GAMMAc_list[m] = np.vstack((phi_qc, np.zeros((p*Nq_list[m],1))))
671            GAMMAu_list[m] = np.vstack((np.eye(Nq_list[m]), np.zeros((p*Nq_list[m],Nq_list[m]))))
672            
673            # Define Measurment equation Matrices
674            LAMBDAs_list[m] = np.vstack((np.hstack((np.zeros((Nm_list[m],Nq_list[m])), np.transpose(phi_mq))),1/freq_ratio_list[m]*np.hstack((np.tile(np.eye(Nq_list[m]), freq_ratio_list[m]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m],Nq_list[m]*(p-(freq_ratio_list[m]-1))))))))
675            
676        
677            LAMBDAz_list[m] = np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mm), np.zeros((Nq_list[m], p*Nm_list[m]))))
678            LAMBDAc_list[m] = np.vstack((phi_mc, np.zeros((Nq_list[m],1))))
679            LAMBDAu_list[m] = np.vstack((np.eye(Nm_list[m]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m],Nm_list[m]))))
680            
681            # Define W matrix
682            Wmatrix_list[m] = np.hstack((np.eye(Nm_list[m]), np.zeros((Nm_list[m], Nq_list[m]))))
683            LAMBDAs_t_list[m] = np.matmul(Wmatrix_list[m],LAMBDAs_list[m])
684            LAMBDAz_t_list[m] = np.matmul(Wmatrix_list[m], LAMBDAz_list[m])
685            LAMBDAc_t_list[m] = np.matmul(Wmatrix_list[m], LAMBDAc_list[m])
686            LAMBDAu_t_list[m] = np.matmul(Wmatrix_list[m], LAMBDAu_list[m])
687    
688            # now we need to define the new low frequency data as the temporally disaggregated
689            # low frequency data of the current iteration
690            
691            if m < (len(YMh_list)-1):
692                if j == 0:
693                    #Yq_list.append((np.kron(lstate, np.ones((1,freq_ratio_list[m+1])))).T)
694                    YQ0_list.append(YYact)#YQ0_list.append(YYact[:,-Nq_list[m+1]:])
695                    YQ_list.append(np.kron(YQ0_list[m+1], np.ones((freq_ratio_list[m+1],1))))#[np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)])):,:])
696                    #Yq_list.append(YQ_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:])
697                    YM_list[m+1] = YM_list[m+1][2*np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)])):,:]
698                    
699                    T_list.append(YQ_list[m+1].shape[0])
700                    
701                    Tstar_list.append(YM_list[m+1].shape[0])
702
703                    Tnew_list.append(Tstar_list[m+1]-T_list[m+1])
704
705                    
706                    YDATA_list.append(np.full((Tstar_list[m+1],nv_list[m+1]), np.nan))
707                    YDATA_list[m+1][:,:Nm_list[m+1]] = YM_list[m+1]#[-Tstar_list[m+1]:,:]
708                    
709                    T0_list.append(int(nlags_list_[m+1]))
710                    p_list.append(int(nlags_list_[m+1]))
711                    nlags_list.append(p_list[m+1])
712                    kq_list.append(Nq_list[m+1] * p_list[m+1])
713                    nobs_list.append(int(T_list[m+1]) - int(T0_list[m+1]))
714                    Tnobs_list.append(Tstar_list[m+1]-T0_list[m+1])
715                    
716                
717                    
718                    #for writing to a forecast w/ history file
719                    #YMh_list[m+1] = YMh_list[m+1][int(T0_list[m+1]):-int(freq_ratio_list[m+1]),:]
720                    YMh_list[m+1] = YMh_list[m+1][2*np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)]))+int(T0_list[m+1]):-int(freq_ratio_list[m+1]),:]
721                    varstxt_list.append(np.hstack((YMX_list[m+1].columns, YQX_list[0].columns)))
722                    smpltxt_list.append(YMX_list[m+1].index[int(T0_list[m+1]):])
723                    
724                    index_NY_list.append(np.isnan(YDATA_list[m+1][nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1]:Tnobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:]).T) # TODO CHECK
725                    
726                    # Parameter estimation
727                    # Matrices for collecting draws from Posterior Density
728                    Sigmap_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),nv_list[m+1],nv_list[m+1])))
729                    Phip_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),int(nv_list[m+1])*int(p_list[m+1])+1,int(nv_list[m+1]))))
730                    Cons_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),nv_list[m+1])))
731                    lstate_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),Nq_list[m+1],int(Tnobs_list[m+1]))))
732                    YYactsim_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),freq_ratio_list[m+1]+1,nv_list[m+1])))
733                    XXactsim_list.append(np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),int(freq_ratio_list[m+1])+1,int(nv_list[m+1])*int(p_list[m+1])+1)))
734                    
735                    At_mat_list.append(np.zeros((int(Tnobs_list[m+1]), Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1))))
736                    Pt_mat_list.append(np.zeros((int(Tnobs_list[m+1]), (Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1))**2)))
737                    Atildemat_list.append(np.zeros((self.nsim, Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1))))
738                    Ptildemat_list.append(np.zeros((self.nsim, Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1),Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1))))
739                    loglh_list.append(0)
740                    counter_list.append(0)
741                    
742                    # Define phi, phi(mm), phi(mq), phi(mc) used in alt ss rep -- eq (9)
743                    phi_mm_list.append(np.zeros((int(Nm_list[m+1])*int(p_list[m+1]),int(Nm_list[m+1]))))
744                    phi_mm_list[m+1][:Nm_list[m+1],:Nm_list[m+1]] = np.eye(Nm_list[m+1])
745                    
746                    phi_mq_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*int(p_list[m+1]),int(Nm_list[m+1]))))
747                    phi_mc_list.append(np.zeros((1,Nm_list[m+1])))
748                    phi_qc_list.append(np.zeros((1,Nq_list[m+1])))
749                    
750                    Phi_list.append(np.vstack((0.95 * np.eye(int(Nm_list[m+1])+Nq_list[m+1]), np.zeros(((int(Nm_list[m+1])+Nq_list[m+1])*(int(p_list[m+1])-1)+1, int(Nm_list[m+1])+Nq_list[m+1])))))
751                    
752                    # Define Transition Equation Matrices in eq (10)
753                    GAMMAs_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*(int(p_list[m+1])+1), Nq_list[m+1] * (int(p_list[m+1])+1))))
754                    IQ = np.eye(Nq_list[m+1])
755                    
756                    for k in range(int(p_list[m+1])):
757                        GAMMAs_list[m+1][(k+1)*Nq_list[m+1]:(k+2)*Nq_list[m+1], k*Nq_list[m+1]:(k+1)*Nq_list[m+1]] = IQ
758                        
759                    GAMMAs_list[m+1][:Nq_list[m+1],:Nq_list[m+1]] = 0.95 * np.eye(Nq_list[m+1])
760                    
761                    GAMMAz_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]* (int(p_list[m+1])+1), int(Nm_list[m+1])*p_list[m+1])))
762                    GAMMAc_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]+1), 1)))
763                    GAMMAu_list.append(np.vstack((np.eye(Nq_list[m+1]), np.zeros((p_list[m+1]*Nq_list[m+1],Nq_list[m+1])))))
764
765                    LAMBDAs_list.append(np.vstack((np.hstack((np.zeros((Nm_list[m+1],Nq_list[m+1])), np.transpose(phi_mq_list[m+1]))),1/freq_ratio_list[m+1]*np.hstack((np.tile(np.eye(Nq_list[m+1]), freq_ratio_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1],Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]-(freq_ratio_list[m+1]-1)))))))))
766                    
767                    LAMBDAz_list.append(np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mm_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1], p_list[m+1]*Nm_list[m+1])))))
768                    LAMBDAc_list.append(np.vstack((np.transpose(phi_mc_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1],1)))))
769                    LAMBDAu_list.append(np.vstack((np.eye(Nm_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1],Nm_list[m+1])))))
770                    
771                    # Define Covariance Terms sig_mm, sig_mq_sig_qm, siq_qq
772                    sigma_list.append((1e-4)*np.eye(Nm_list[m+1]+Nq_list[m+1]))
773                    sig_mm_list.append(sigma_list[m+1][:Nm_list[m+1],:Nm_list[m+1]])
774                    sig_mq_list.append(sigma_list[m+1][:Nm_list[m+1], Nm_list[m+1]:])
775                    sig_qm_list.append(sigma_list[m+1][Nm_list[m+1]:, :Nm_list[m+1]])
776                    sig_qq_list.append(sigma_list[m+1][Nm_list[m+1]:,Nm_list[m+1]:])
777                    
778                    # Define W matrix in eq (15) -- _t for tilde
779                    Wmatrix_list.append(np.hstack((np.eye(Nm_list[m+1]), np.zeros((Nm_list[m+1],Nq_list[m+1])))))
780                    LAMBDAs_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[m+1] @ LAMBDAs_list[m+1])
781                    LAMBDAz_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[m+1] @ LAMBDAz_list[m+1])
782                    LAMBDAc_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[m+1] @ LAMBDAc_list[m+1])
783                    LAMBDAu_t_list.append(Wmatrix_list[m+1] @ LAMBDAu_list[m+1])
784                    
785                    At_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]+1))))
786                    Pt_list.append(np.zeros((Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]+1), Nq_list[m+1]*(p_list[m+1]+1))))
787                    
788                    for kk in range(5):
789                        Pt_list[m+1] = GAMMAs_list[m+1] @ Pt_list[m+1] @ GAMMAs_list[m+1].T + GAMMAu_list[m+1] @ sig_qq_list[m+1] @ GAMMAu_list[m+1].T
790                    
791                    #YM_short = YM_list[m+1][2*np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)])):,:]
792                    
793                    # Lagged HF observations
794                    Zm_list.append(np.zeros((nobs_list[m+1], Nm_list[m+1]*p_list[m+1])))
795                    for k in range(p_list[m+1]):
796                        Zm_list[m+1][:, k * Nm_list[m+1]:(k+1)*Nm_list[m+1]] = YM_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]-(k+1):T0_list[m+1]+nobs_list[m+1]-(k+1),:]
797                    # Observations in Monthly Freq
798                    
799                    Ym_list.append(YM_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:])
800                    #Ym_list.append(YM_list[m+1][:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:])    
801                    #Yq_list.append(YQ_list[m+1])#
802                    Yq_list.append(YQ_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:])
803                    
804                    
805                    
806                else:
807                    #Yq_list[m+1] = (np.kron(lstate, np.ones((1,freq_ratio_list[m+1])))).T
808                    YQ0_list[m+1] = YYact
809                    YQ_list[m+1] = np.kron(YQ0_list[m+1], np.ones((freq_ratio_list[m+1],1)))#[np.product(np.array(nlags_list_[:(m+2)])):,:]
810                    Yq_list[m+1] = YQ_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:]#YQ_list[m+1][T0_list[m+1]:nobs_list[m+1]+T0_list[m+1],:]
811                    T_list[m+1] = YQ_list[m+1].shape[0]
812                    Tnew_list[m+1] = Tstar_list[m+1]-T_list[m+1]
813                    
814                YDATA_list[m+1][:T_list[m+1],Nm_list[m+1]:] = YQ_list[m+1]    
815            
816            if j == 0:
817                At_draw_list.append(At_draw)
818            else:
819                At_draw_list[m] = At_draw
820            
821            if j == 0:
822                Pmean_list.append(Pmean)
823            else:
824                Pmean_list[m] = Pmean
825                    
826                    
827            #TODO
828        
829            
830        self.YYactsim = YYactsim_list[-1]
831        self.XXactsim = XXactsim_list[-1]
832        self.Phip = Phip_list[-1]
833        self.Sigmap = Sigmap_list[-1]
834        self.YDATA = YDATA_list[-1]
835        self.select_q = select_q
836        self.select_m = select_m_list[-1]
837        self.select = select_list[-1]
838        self.varlist = varlist_list[-1]
839        self.Nm = Nm_list[-1]
840        self.nv = nv_list[-1]
841        self.freq_ratio = freq_ratio_list[-1]
842        self.T = T_list[-1]
843        self.Tstar = Tstar_list[-1]
844        self.YQX = YQX_list[-1]
845        self.YMX = YMX_list[-1]
846        self.YQ = YQ_list[-1]
847        self.YM = YM_list[-1]
848        self.YMh = YMh_list[-1]
849        self.Ym = Ym_list[-1]
850        self.Yq = Yq_list[-1]
851        self.T0 = T0_list[-1]
852        self.Tnew = Tnew_list[-1]
853    
854    
855    #save lists to self
856    self.YMh_list = YMh_list
857    self.T0_list = T0_list
858    self.freq_ratio_list = freq_ratio_list
859    self.varstxt_list = varstxt_list
860    self.Nm_list = Nm_list
861    self.Nq_list = Nq_list
862    self.nv_list = nv_list        
863    self.YYactsim_list = YYactsim_list
864    self.XXactsim_list = XXactsim_list
865    self.Phip_list = Phip_list
866    self.Sigmap_list = Sigmap_list
867    self.select_list = select_list
868    self.Tnew_list = Tnew_list
869    self.Ym_list = Ym_list
870    self.Yq_list = Yq_list
871    self.select_m_list = select_m_list
872    self.select_q = select_q
873    self.lstate_list = lstate_list
874    self.nlags_list = nlags_list
875    self.varlist_list = varlist_list
876    self.YMX_list =YMX_list
877    self.index_list = index_list

Estimates the model using the model parameter specified in the initialization.

And the data provided.

Parameters

mufbvar_data : mufbvar_data class object data in the form of a mufbvar_data class object hyp : list of list list containing list of the hyperparameters for each frequency step

1. overall tightness

2. scaling down the variance for the coefficients of a distant lag

3. number of observations used for obtaining the prior for the covariance matrix of error terms

4. tuning parameter for coefficients for constant

5. tuning parameter for the covariance between coefficients
def forecast(self, H, conditionals=None): 
 883def forecast(self, H, conditionals = None):
 884    
 885    '''
 886    Method to generate the forecasts in the highest frequency.\n
 887    
 888    Parameters
 889    ----------
 890    H : int
 891        Forecast horizon in highest frequnecy
 892    conditionals : pandas DataFrame or None
 893        Conditional forecasts\n
 894        column names must be the variable names\n
 895        no index needed\n
 896        either values or np.nan
 897    
 898    '''
 899    self.H = H
 900    # First we need to extend the index
 901    # depending on the highest frequencies the approach differs
 902    
 903    if self.frequencies[-1] == "D":
 904        
 905        self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1].append(pd.date_range(start=self.index_list[-1][-1] + Day(), periods=H, freq='D'))
 906
 907        # Function to check if a month has more than 20 days
 908        def has_more_than_20_days(month, dti):
 909            return sum(dti.to_period('M') == month) > 20
 910
 911        # Function to remove the last day of a month
 912        def remove_last_day_of_month(month, dti):
 913            return dti[~((dti.to_period('M') == month) & (dti.day > 20))]
 914
 915        # Check each month in extended_dti
 916        for month in self.index_list[-1].to_period('M').unique():
 917            # If a month has more than 20 days
 918            while has_more_than_20_days(month, self.index_list[-1]):
 919                # Remove the last day of that month
 920                self.index_list[-1] = remove_last_day_of_month(month, self.index_list[-1])
 921                # Add an additional day at the end
 922                self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1].append(pd.DatetimeIndex([self.index_list[-1][-1] + Day()]))
 923    
 924    if self.frequencies[-1] == 'W':
 925        self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1].append(pd.date_range(start=self.index_list[-1][-1] + Week(), periods=H, freq='W-MON'))
 926
 927        # Function to check if a month has more than 4 weeks
 928        def has_more_than_4_weeks(month, dti):
 929            return sum(dti.to_period('M') == month) > 4
 930
 931        # Function to remove the last week of a month
 932        def remove_last_week_of_month(month, dti):
 933            return dti[~((dti.to_period('M') == month) & (dti.day > 28))]
 934
 935        # Check each month in extended_dti
 936        for month in self.index_list[-1].to_period('M').unique():
 937            # If a month has more than 4 weeks
 938            while has_more_than_4_weeks(month, self.index_list[-1]):
 939                # Remove the last week of that month
 940                self.index_list[-1] = remove_last_week_of_month(month, self.index_list[-1])
 941                # Add an additional week at the end
 942                self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1].append(pd.DatetimeIndex([self.index_list[-1][-1] + Week()]))
 943                
 944    if self.frequencies[-1] == 'M':
 945        self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1].append(pd.date_range(start=self.index_list[-1][-1] + MonthBegin(), periods=12, freq='MS'))
 946    
 947    if self.frequencies[-1] == 'Q':
 948        self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1].append(pd.date_range(start=self.index_list[-1][-1] + QuarterBegin(), periods=H, freq='QS'))
 949        
 950    
 951    # Now we need to look at the conditional forecasts:
 952    
 953    YYcond = pd.DataFrame(np.nan, index =  self.index_list[-1][-H:], columns= self.varlist_list[-1])
 954    
 955    if conditionals is not None:
 956        conditionals.index = YYcond.index[:len(conditionals.index)]
 957        
 958        YYcond.update(conditionals)
 959        YYcond = np.array(YYcond) 
 960        YYcond[:,(self.select_list[-1] == 1)] = YYcond[:,(self.select_list[-1] == 1)]/100
 961        YYcond[:,(self.select_list[-1] == 0)] = np.log(YYcond[:,(self.select_list[-1] == 0)])
 962    exc = ~np.isnan(YYcond)
 963        
 964    YY_m_list = deque()
 965    YY_med_list = deque()
 966    YY_095_list = deque()
 967    YY_005_list = deque()
 968    YY_084_list = deque()
 969    YY_016_list = deque()
 970    forecast_draws_list = deque()
 971    
 972    
 973    H_= int(self.H)
 974            
 975    #Prepare index for output
 976    self.index_list[-1] = self.index_list[-1][self.index_list[-1].shape[0]-(self.lstate_list[-1].shape[2]+H_):]
 977
 978    ###############  
 979    # Forecasting #
 980    ###############
 981    
 982    # store forecasts in monthly frequency
 983    YYvector_ml  = np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),H_,self.Nm_list[-1]+self.Nq_list[-1]))     # collects now/forecast      
 984    
 985    # store forecasts in quarterly frequency
 986    YYvector_ql  = np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),int(self.H/self.freq_ratio_list[-1]),self.Nm_list[-1]+self.Nq_list[-1]))   
 987    YYvector_qg  = np.zeros((round((self.nsim)/self.thining),int(self.H/self.freq_ratio_list[-1]),self.Nm_list[-1]+self.Nq_list[-1]))
 988    
 989    print(" ", end = '\n')
 990    print("Multiple Frequency BVAR: Forecasting", end = "\n")
 991    print("Forecast Horizon: ", H_, end = "\n")
 992    print("Total Draws: ", self.nsim)
 993    
 994    
 995    for jj in tqdm(range(round((self.nsim)/self.thining))):
 996        
 997        YYact = np.squeeze(self.YYactsim_list[-1][jj, -1, :])
 998        XXact = np.squeeze(self.XXactsim_list[-1][jj, -1, :])
 999        post_phi = np.squeeze(self.Phip_list[-1][jj,:,:])
1000        post_sig = np.squeeze(self.Sigmap_list[-1][jj,:,:])
1001        
1002
1003        # Bayesian Estimation Forecasting 
1004        ###################################
1005
1006        
1007        YYpred = np.zeros((H_+1, self.nv_list[-1])) # forecasts from VAR
1008        YYpred[0,:] = YYact
1009        XXpred = np.zeros((H_+1, self.nv_list[-1]*self.nlags_list[-1]+1))
1010        XXpred[:,-1] = np.full((H_+1), fill_value = 1)
1011        XXpred[0,:] = XXact
1012        
1013        # given posterior draw, draw number (H+1) random sequence
1014
1015        error_pred = np.zeros((H_+1, self.nv_list[-1]))
1016        
1017        for h in range(H_+1):
1018            if post_sig.size > 1:
1019                error_pred[h,:] = np.random.default_rng().multivariate_normal(mean = np.zeros(self.nv_list[-1]), cov = post_sig, method = "cholesky")
1020            else:
1021                error_pred[h,:] = np.random.default_rng().normal(loc = 0, scale = post_sig)
1022        # given posterior draw, iterate forward to construct forecasts
1023        
1024        for h in range(1,H_+1):
1025            
1026            XXpred[h,self.nv_list[-1]:-1] = XXpred[h-1, :-self.nv_list[-1]-1]
1027            XXpred[h, :self.nv_list[-1]] = YYpred[h-1, :]
1028            #YYpred[h,:] = (XXpred[h,:] @ post_phi + error_pred[h,:])
1029            YYpred[h,:] = (1-exc[h-1,:]) * (XXpred[h,:] @ post_phi + error_pred[h,:]) + exc[h-1,:] * np.nan_to_num(YYcond[h-1,:])
1030        
1031        YYpred1 = copy.deepcopy(YYpred)
1032        YYpred = YYpred[1:,:]
1033        
1034
1035        
1036        
1037        # Now-/Forecasts
1038        # Store in hf
1039        YYvector_ml[jj,:,:] = YYpred
1040        
1041    forecast_draws_list.append(YYvector_ml)
1042    
1043    #mean
1044    YYftr_m = np.nanmean(YYvector_ml[self.nburn:,:,:], axis = 0)
1045    YYftr_m[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYftr_m[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1046    YYftr_m[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYftr_m[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1047    
1048    YYnow_m = np.mean(self.YYactsim_list[-1][self.nburn:,1:(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]], axis = 0) # actual/nowcast monthlies
1049    if YYnow_m.size:
1050        YYnow_m[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_m[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1051        YYnow_m[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_m[:,(self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1052    
1053    lstate_m = np.mean(self.lstate_list[-1][self.nburn:,:,:], axis = 0).T # hf obs for lf vars
1054    lstate_m[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_m[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1055    lstate_m[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_m[:, (self.select_q[-1]== 0)[0]])
1056    
1057
1058    
1059    YMh_len_correction = int(self.YMh_list[-1].shape[0] - lstate_m[:-(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]),:].shape[0])
1060    
1061    if self.YMh_list[-1].size:
1062        self.YMh_list[-1][:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * self.YMh_list[-1][:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1063        self.YMh_list[-1][:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] =  np.exp(self.YMh_list[-1][:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1064    
1065    if self.YMh_list[-1].size:
1066        YY_m_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((self.YMh_list[-1][YMh_len_correction:,:], lstate_m[:-(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]),:])), np.hstack((YYnow_m, lstate_m[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_m)))
1067        #YY_m_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((self.YMh_list[-1], lstate_m[:-(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]),:])), np.hstack((YYnow_m, lstate_m[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_m)))
1068    else:
1069        YY_m_list.append(np.vstack((lstate_m,YYftr_m)))
1070    
1071    
1072    
1073    
1074    #self.mean_phi = np.mean(self.Phip, axis = 0)
1075    
1076    #median
1077    YYftr_med = np.nanmedian(YYvector_ml[self.nburn:,:,:], axis = 0)
1078    YYftr_med[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYftr_med[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1079    YYftr_med[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYftr_med[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1080    
1081    YYnow_med = np.median(self.YYactsim_list[-1][self.nburn:,1:(self.freq_ratio+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]], axis = 0) # actual/nowcast monthlies
1082    
1083    if YYnow_med.size:
1084        YYnow_med[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_med[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1085        YYnow_med[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_med[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1086    
1087    lstate_med = np.median(self.lstate_list[-1][self.nburn:,:,:], axis = 0).T # hf obs for lf vars
1088    lstate_med[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_med[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1089    lstate_med[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_med[:, (self.select_q[-1]== 0)[0]])
1090    
1091    if self.YMh_list[-1].size:
1092        YY_med_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((self.YMh_list[-1][YMh_len_correction:,:], lstate_med[:-self.freq_ratio_list[-1],:])), np.hstack((YYnow_med, lstate_m[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_med)))
1093    else:
1094        YY_med_list.append(np.vstack((lstate_med,YYftr_med)))
1095        
1096    # safe uncertainty
1097    # 95%
1098    YYftr_095 = np.nanquantile(YYvector_ml[self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.95 ,axis = 0)
1099    YYftr_095[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYftr_095[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1100    YYftr_095[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYftr_095[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1101    
1102    YYnow_095 = np.quantile(self.YYactsim_list[-1][self.nburn:,1:(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]], q = 0.95, axis = 0) # actual/nowcast monthlies
1103    if YYnow_095.size:
1104        YYnow_095[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_095[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1105        YYnow_095[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_095[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1106    
1107    lstate_095 = np.quantile(self.lstate_list[-1][self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.95, axis = 0).T # hf obs for lf vars
1108    lstate_095[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_095[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1109    lstate_095[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_095[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]])
1110    
1111    YMna = np.full(self.YMh_list[-1].shape, np.nan)
1112    
1113    if YMna.size:
1114        YY_095_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((YMna[YMh_len_correction:,:],lstate_095[:-self.freq_ratio_list[-1],:])), np.hstack((YYnow_095, lstate_095[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_095)))
1115    else:
1116        YY_095_list.append(np.vstack((lstate_095,YYftr_095)))
1117    
1118    # 84%
1119    YYftr_084 = np.nanquantile(YYvector_ml[self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.84 ,axis = 0)
1120    YYftr_084[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYftr_084[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1121    YYftr_084[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYftr_084[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1122    
1123    YYnow_084 = np.quantile(self.YYactsim_list[-1][self.nburn:,1:(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]], q = 0.84, axis = 0) # actual/nowcast monthlies
1124    if YYnow_084.size:
1125        YYnow_084[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_084[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1126        YYnow_084[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_084[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1127    
1128    lstate_084 = np.quantile(self.lstate_list[-1][self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.84, axis = 0).T # hf obs for lf vars
1129    lstate_084[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_084[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1130    lstate_084[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_084[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]])
1131    
1132    YMna = np.full(self.YMh_list[-1].shape, np.nan)
1133    
1134    if YMna.size:
1135        YY_084_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((YMna[YMh_len_correction:,:],lstate_084[:-self.freq_ratio_list[-1],:])), np.hstack((YYnow_084, lstate_084[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_084)))
1136    else:
1137        YY_084_list.append(np.vstack((lstate_084,YYftr_084)))
1138        
1139    # 16%
1140    
1141    YYftr_016 = np.nanquantile(YYvector_ml[self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.16 ,axis = 0)
1142    YYftr_016[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYftr_016[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1143    YYftr_016[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYftr_016[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1144    
1145    YYnow_016 = np.quantile(self.YYactsim_list[-1][self.nburn:,1:(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]], q = 0.16, axis = 0) # actual/nowcast monthlies
1146    if YYnow_016.size:
1147        YYnow_016[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_016[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1148        YYnow_016[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_016[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1149    
1150    lstate_016 = np.quantile(self.lstate_list[-1][self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.16, axis = 0).T # hf obs for lf vars
1151    lstate_016[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_016[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1152    lstate_016[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_016[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]])
1153    
1154    YMna = np.full(self.YMh_list[-1].shape, np.nan)
1155    
1156    if YMna.size:
1157        YY_016_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((YMna[YMh_len_correction:,:],lstate_016[:-self.freq_ratio_list[-1],:])), np.hstack((YYnow_016, lstate_016[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_016)))
1158    else:
1159        YY_016_list.append(np.vstack((lstate_016,YYftr_016)))
1160    
1161    
1162    # 5%    
1163    
1164    YYftr_005 = np.nanquantile(YYvector_ml[self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.05 ,axis = 0)
1165    YYftr_005[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYftr_005[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1166    YYftr_005[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYftr_005[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1167    
1168    YYnow_005 = np.quantile(self.YYactsim_list[-1][self.nburn:,1:(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]], q = 0.05, axis = 0) # actual/nowcast monthlies
1169    
1170    if YYnow_005.size:   
1171        YYnow_005[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_005[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1172        YYnow_005[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_005[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1173    
1174    lstate_005 = np.quantile(self.lstate_list[-1][self.nburn:,:,:], q = 0.05, axis = 0).T # hf obs for lf vars
1175    lstate_005[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_005[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1176    lstate_005[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_005[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]])
1177    
1178    if YMna.size:
1179        YY_005_list.append(np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((YMna[YMh_len_correction:,:], lstate_005[:-self.freq_ratio_list[-1],:])), np.hstack((YYnow_005, lstate_005[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), YYftr_005)))
1180    else:
1181        YY_005_list.append(np.vstack((lstate_005,YYftr_005)))
1182            
1183    YY_mean_pd = pd.DataFrame(YY_m_list[-1], columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1184    YY_mean_pd.index = self.index_list[-1]
1185    
1186    YY_median_pd = pd.DataFrame(YY_med_list[-1], columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1187    YY_median_pd.index = self.index_list[-1]
1188    
1189    YY_095_pd = pd.DataFrame(YY_095_list[-1], columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1190    YY_095_pd.index = self.index_list[-1]
1191    
1192    YY_005_pd = pd.DataFrame(YY_005_list[-1], columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1193    YY_005_pd.index = self.index_list[-1]
1194    
1195    YY_084_pd = pd.DataFrame(YY_084_list[-1], columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1196    YY_084_pd.index = self.index_list[-1]
1197    
1198    YY_016_pd = pd.DataFrame(YY_016_list[-1], columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1199    YY_016_pd.index = self.index_list[-1]
1200
1201    self.YY_095 = YY_095_list
1202    self.YY_084 = YY_084_list
1203    self.YY_016 = YY_016_list
1204    self.YY_005 = YY_005_list
1205    self.YY_mean = YY_m_list
1206    self.YY_median = YY_med_list
1207    self.forecast_draws_list = forecast_draws_list
1208    
1209    self.YY_mean_pd = YY_mean_pd
1210    self.YY_median_pd = YY_median_pd
1211    self.YY_095_pd = YY_095_pd
1212    self.YY_005_pd = YY_005_pd
1213    self.YY_084_pd = YY_084_pd
1214    self.YY_016_pd = YY_016_pd

Method to generate the forecasts in the highest frequency.

Parameters

H : int Forecast horizon in highest frequnecy conditionals : pandas DataFrame or None Conditional forecasts

column names must be the variable names

no index needed

either values or np.nan
def aggregate(self, frequency, reset_index=True): 
1217def aggregate(self, frequency, reset_index = True):
1218    
1219    '''
1220    Aggregates the Mean, Median and quantililes in the highest frequency to the desired frequency. \n
1221    The Function ensures, that we start at the beginning of a Year or Quarter depending on the chosen frequency \n
1222    
1223    Parameters
1224    ----------
1225    frequency : str
1226        The frequency to which the data should be aggregated to
1227    reset_index : boolean
1228        Schould index be changed to period Index
1229
1230    '''
1231    if self.forecast_draws_list is None :
1232            sys.exit("Error: To gaggregate generate forecasts first")
1233            
1234    if frequency not in ["Y","Q"] :
1235            sys.exit("Error: Aggregation currently only implemented for aggregation to yearly and quarterly frequency")
1236    freq_lf = frequency
1237    freq_hf = self.frequencies[-1]
1238    
1239    YY_full_list = deque()
1240    YY_full_list_agg = deque()
1241    
1242    YYnow = copy.copy(self.YYactsim_list[-1])# actual/nowcast
1243    lstate = copy.copy(self.lstate_list[-1]) # hf obs for lf vars
1244    
1245    
1246    YMh_len_correction = int(self.YMh_list[-1].shape[0] - lstate[0][:,:-(self.freq_ratio_list[-1])].shape[1])
1247    
1248    if self.YMh_list[-1].size:
1249        for i in range(self.nsim):
1250            lstate_temp = lstate[i].T
1251            lstate_temp[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * lstate_temp[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 1)[0]]
1252            lstate_temp[:, (self.select_q[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(lstate_temp[:, (self.select_q[-1]== 0)[0]])
1253            YYnow_temp = YYnow[i][1:(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]+1),:self.Nm_list[-1]]
1254            YYnow_temp[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * YYnow_temp[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1255            YYnow_temp[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(YYnow_temp[:, (self.select_m_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1256            forecast_draws_temp = copy.copy(self.forecast_draws_list[-1][i,:,:])
1257            forecast_draws_temp[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]] = 100 * forecast_draws_temp[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 1)[0]]
1258            forecast_draws_temp[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]] = np.exp(forecast_draws_temp[:, (self.select_list[-1] == 0)[0]])
1259
1260            temp = np.vstack((np.vstack((np.hstack((self.YMh_list[-1][YMh_len_correction:,:], lstate_temp[:-(self.freq_ratio_list[-1]), :])), np.hstack((YYnow_temp, lstate_temp[-self.freq_ratio_list[-1]:,:])))), forecast_draws_temp))
1261            temp = pd.DataFrame(temp, columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1262            temp.index = self.index_list[-1]
1263            YY_full_list.append(temp)
1264    else:
1265        for i in range(self.nsim):
1266            temp = np.vstack((lstate[i,:,:],self.forecast_draws_list[i,:,:]))
1267            temp = pd.DataFrame(temp, columns = self.varlist_list[-1])
1268            temp.index = self.index_list[-1]
1269            YY_full_list.append(temp)
1270    
1271    
1272    def find_first_position(arr, numbers, count):
1273        for i in range(len(arr) - count + 1):
1274            if arr[i] in numbers and all(arr[i] == arr[j] for j in range(i+1, i+count)):
1275                return i
1276    
1277    
1278            
1279    def agg_helper(freq_lf, freq_hf, df):
1280        # Set the frequency ratio        
1281        if freq_hf == "Q" and freq_lf == "Y":
1282            freq_ratio = 4
1283        elif freq_hf == "M" and freq_lf == "Y":
1284            freq_ratio = 12
1285        elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "Y":
1286            freq_ratio = 48
1287        elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "Y":
1288            freq_ratio = 260
1289        elif freq_hf == "M" and freq_lf == "Q":
1290            freq_ratio = 3
1291        elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "Q":
1292            freq_ratio = 12
1293        elif freq_hf == "W" and freq_lf == "M":
1294            freq_ratio = 4
1295        elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "W":
1296            freq_ratio = 5
1297        elif freq_hf == "D" and freq_lf == "M":
1298            freq_ratio = 20
1299                
1300        if frequency == 'Q':
1301            if freq_hf == 'W':
1302                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1, 4, 7, 10], 4 )
1303            elif freq_hf == 'M':
1304                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1, 4, 7, 10], 1)
1305            elif freq_hf == 'D':
1306                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1, 4, 7, 10], 20)
1307        elif frequency == 'Y':
1308            if freq_hf == 'Q':
1309                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1,3], 1 )
1310            elif freq_hf == 'M':
1311                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1], 1)
1312            elif freq_hf == 'W':
1313                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1], 4)
1314            elif freq_hf == 'D':
1315                start = find_first_position(df.index.month, [1], 20)
1316        return freq_ratio, start
1317    
1318    
1319    freq_ratio, start = agg_helper(freq_lf, freq_hf, YY_full_list[0])
1320    print("Aggregating for each draw")
1321    for i in tqdm(range(self.nburn, self.nsim)):
1322        temp = YY_full_list[i].iloc[start:,].groupby(YY_full_list[i].iloc[start:,].reset_index().index // freq_ratio).filter(lambda x: len(x) == freq_ratio)
1323        temp = temp.groupby(temp.reset_index().index // freq_ratio).mean()
1324        temp.index = YY_full_list[i].iloc[start:,].index[::freq_ratio][:temp.shape[0]]
1325        temp.index = temp.index.map(lambda x: x.replace(day=1))
1326        YY_full_list_agg.append(temp)
1327        
1328    self.YY_mean_agg = pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).groupby(pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).index).mean()
1329    self.YY_median_agg = pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).groupby(pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).index).median()
1330    self.YY_095_agg = pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).groupby(pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).index).quantile(0.95)
1331    self.YY_005_agg = pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).groupby(pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).index).quantile(0.05)
1332    self.YY_084_agg = pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).groupby(pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).index).quantile(0.84)
1333    self.YY_016_agg = pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).groupby(pd.concat(YY_full_list_agg).index).quantile(0.16)
1334    
1335    hist = copy.copy(self.input_data)
1336    hist.appendleft(self.input_data_Q)
1337    i = 0
1338    for m in self.frequencies:
1339        if self.frequencies.index(m) == self.frequencies.index(frequency):
1340            # history ersetzen durch originaldaten 
1341            # interval durch NA
1342            idx = self.YY_mean_agg.index.intersection(hist[i].index, sort=False)
1343            self.YY_mean_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = hist[i].loc[idx, hist[i].columns]
1344            self.YY_median_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = hist[i].loc[idx, hist[i].columns]
1345            self.YY_095_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1346            self.YY_005_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1347            self.YY_084_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1348            self.YY_016_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1349            
1350        if self.frequencies.index(m) > self.frequencies.index(frequency) & self.frequencies.index(m) < len(self.frequencies)-1:
1351            freq_ratio_temp, start_temp = agg_helper(frequency, m, hist[i])
1352            hist_agg = hist[i].iloc[start_temp:,].groupby(hist[i].iloc[start_temp:,].reset_index().index // freq_ratio_temp).filter(lambda x: len(x) == freq_ratio_temp)
1353            hist_agg = hist_agg.groupby(hist_agg.reset_index().index // freq_ratio_temp).mean()
1354            hist_agg.index = hist[i].iloc[start_temp:,].index[::freq_ratio_temp][:hist_agg.shape[0]]
1355            hist_agg.index = hist_agg.index.map(lambda x: x.replace(day=1))
1356            
1357            idx = hist_agg.index.intersection(self.YY_mean_agg.index, sort=False)
1358            self.YY_mean_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = hist_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns]
1359            self.YY_median_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = hist_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns]
1360            self.YY_095_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1361            self.YY_005_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1362            self.YY_084_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1363            self.YY_016_agg.loc[idx, hist[i].columns] = np.nan
1364        
1365        i = i+1
1366    
1367    if reset_index == True:
1368        index_new = pd.PeriodIndex(self.YY_mean_agg.index, freq= frequency)
1369        self.YY_mean_agg.index = index_new
1370        self.YY_median_agg.index = index_new
1371        self.YY_095_agg.index = index_new
1372        self.YY_005_agg.index = index_new
1373        self.YY_084_agg.index = index_new
1374        self.YY_016_agg.index = index_new
1375    
1376    self.agg_freq = frequency

Aggregates the Mean, Median and quantililes in the highest frequency to the desired frequency.

The Function ensures, that we start at the beginning of a Year or Quarter depending on the chosen frequency

Parameters

frequency : str The frequency to which the data should be aggregated to reset_index : boolean Schould index be changed to period Index
